About the Role

We are a small but growing skilled home?health agency in the United States. We provide nursing and therapy services to Medicaid patients, and we are looking for a serious, committed Field Coordinator who is ready to work, take initiative, and complete real daily tasks.DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ALREADY HAVE A BUSY SCHEDULE. 



This is not a passive or “easy” job. You will be handling live scheduling, real patient calls, real staff coordination, and time?sensitive tasks that directly impact patient care. If you are reliable, organized, and willing to work hard, this is a long?term opportunity with room to grow.



Responsibilities

Scheduling & Field Coordination

Assign patient visits to PRN nurses and therapists



Confirm staff availability and follow up on unaccepted visits



Reassign visits quickly when cancellations occur



Group visits by ZIP code to reduce travel time



Communication (Must Be Comfortable Calling & Receiving Calls)

Call PRN clinicians with daily updates



Call patients to confirm visit times or schedule changes



Receive calls from staff and patients as needed



Maintain professional, friendly communication at all times



Documentation & Tracking

Monitor EVV check?ins/outs



Follow up on missing or incomplete visit notes



Track SOCs, recerts, and due dates



Update spreadsheets and EMR systems



Recruiting Support

Post job ads for PRN nurses, therapists, and aides



Screen applicants based on basic criteria



Schedule interviews for the agency owner



Maintain a simple candidate tracker



Administrative Support

Assist with intake coordination



Maintain organized records and trackers



Support daily operational tasks as assigned



Qualifications

Required

Excellent English (spoken and written)



Strong organizational and multitasking skills



Willing and able to make and receive calls



Experience in scheduling, coordination, or admin roles



Reliable internet and quiet workspace



Ability to work U.S. Central Time hours



Willing to WORK — not just “be online”



Preferred

Experience in healthcare, home health, or medical admin



Familiarity with EMRs or EVV



Experience with recruiting or screening candidates



What We Offer

Stable, long?term part?time work



Competitive pay based on experience



Flexible but consistent schedule



Supportive, respectful work environment



Opportunity to grow as the agency expands



How to Apply

Please submit the following through OnlineJobs.ph:



Your updated resume



A short voice recording introducing yourself



Your expected hourly rate



Your available working hours (CST)



A brief explanation of your experience with scheduling and/or recruiting.

title: Virtual Assistant – Leasing, Sales & Operations (Admin + Revenue)
description:
We are a Chicago-based real estate company hiring one full-time Virtual Assistant to buy back the CEO’s time and support revenue through leasing, follow-ups, and collections.



Watch this 2-Minute YouTube Video to see who we are! (Below)


-



This is not a basic admin role and not a side hustle.

This role is admin first, sales by default.



If you are reliable, organized, and comfortable following up until things are actually finished, you will do well here. If you need constant reminders, avoid phone calls, or dislike accountability, this role is not a poor fit — it is not a fit at all.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN (IN ORDER OF PRIORITY)

1) Admin & Operations (must be done correctly every time)

• Manage inbox and inbound messages using templates

• Send applications, screening steps, leases, and renewal documents

• Verify references (landlord and employment) and log results

• Schedule tours, confirmations, and follow-ups

• Update Trello cards with notes, status, next steps, and deadlines

• Log payments, invoices, and receipts accurately

• Keep Google Drive folders clean and organized

Accuracy and follow-through are non-negotiable.



2) Leasing, Follow-Ups & Revenue Support

• Work new leads from inquiry ? application ? lease ? first payment

• Follow up consistently with prospects (no dropped leads)

• Follow up with delinquent tenants professionally

• Make outbound calls, texts, WhatsApp, and
 follow-ups (scripts provided)

• Track outcomes clearly (results matter more than effort)



TOOLS WE USE

• Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Drive)

• Trello

• WhatsApp

• Spreadsheets (filters, formulas, clean formatting)



NON-NEGOTIABLES

• Clear, professional written English

• Strong attention to detail

• Follows instructions exactly

• Communicates issues early instead of disappearing

• Comfortable with accountability and daily tracking

• Willing to follow up until things are actually done



HOW SUCCESS IS MEASURED

• Admin tasks completed correctly and on time

• Inbox and messages stay under control

• Leads are followed up until resolved

• Cash collected is logged and documented

• Trello boards reflect reality at all times

• Communication is clear, short, and professional



COMPENSATION & GROWTH PATH (READ CAREFULLY)



This role has a clear performance-based growth path.

Pay increases are earned through execution, not tenure.



Starting Pay (Training & Proof Phase):

• $4.50 per hour for the first 30 days



After Passing Probation (Execution Phase):

• Increase to $6.00 per hour after 30 days if performance standards are met



Growth & Retention Phase:

• Increase to $7.00+ per hour based on consistency, reliability, and ownership of outcomes



Performance-Based Commissions (Paid Separately):

• 20% of cash collected from NEW tenants you directly help close

• 10% of cash recovered from delinquent tenants



Commission is paid only on actual cash received and properly documented.



High performers who demonstrate reliability and ownership may be offered additional paid hours and expanded responsibility.



If you perform well, your pay will increase quickly.

If you do not, this role will not continue.



WORK SCHEDULE

• 40+ hours per week available

• 6 days per week

• Must overlap with US Central Time (Chicago)



Additional hours are paid and offered based on workload, performance, and reliability.

This is a full-time, long-term role for someone who wants stability and growth.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

This role is a good fit if you:

• Want stable, long-term work with a clear path to higher pay

• Are organized, dependable, and calm under pressure

• Take ownership of outcomes, not just tasks

• Follow systems and instructions precisely

• Are comfortable with follow-ups and accountability

This role is not a good fit if you:

• Need constant supervision

• Avoid phone calls or follow-ups

• Miss details and deadlines

• Prefer vague instructions or flexible standards

title: Coder Needed | Dance Academy
description:
Full-time, long-term opportunity.



Environment here is CREATIVE and FUN.

Bonus:

Other:

• Creating beautiful, concise, clean reports

• Research

• Etc.



Our culture is fast-paced and every day is unique.



WORKFLOW:

For starters, you'll be assigned projects. You must take ownership in pushing the projects through completely from A to Z.



Eventually, you'll need to pro-actively identify our shortcomings and opportunities, and propose projects. 



Looking for SMART, CRITICAL THINKERS!



SCHEDULE

9:00am - 6:00 PM PST (Los Angeles time) Monday - Friday



GROWTH:

Payment increases over time.



If you are outstanding, future leadership roles may be possible.



TRAINING:

You'll receive basic training, but every day is unique here. You must be a quick learner with a "can do - I'll figure it out" attitude.



COMPANY CULTURE

Working in a small business like ours is different from a large corporation.



For example:



• More creativity - You'll handle a wide variety of tasks and projects. This is more challenging than just following strict templates, but also more stimulating and exciting.



• Impact -  Your actions will have a big impact on the business, which you will clearly see



• Feedback -  Your feedback on what we are doing well, and what could be better, is not only valued, but is mandatory!  





ABOUT YOU:

• Excellent written English (show this in your application!)

• Coding experience

• Technical - great with computers

• Good listener - only needs to be told once

• Strong communicator (you must OVERcommunicate with management and tea
mbers)

• Smart, quick learner

• Fastidious - attention to detail

• Decent at basic math

• Pro-active - anticipates what may be helpful and goes above and beyond to contribute

• Meticulous, organized, methodical.

• Reliable! Always shows up and focuses.

• Critical, creative thinker. Not robotic. Always looking for better ways to do things. Always considering all the angles of a task.

• Willing to share your opinion - we NEED to hear your opinions

• Able to ask clarifying questions in order to get tasks right the first time

• Always eager to improve yourself and the company’s systems. Habitually thinks strategically and takes action for improvements.

• Self-starter

• Independent decision maker

• Flexible - can quickly adjust on the fly

• Comfortable with excel

• Fast computer

• Fast, dependable Internet

• Bonus if you have experience or interest in salsa or bachata!



APPLY NOW. FORMAT YOUR APPLICATION AS A NUMBERED LIST WITH THE FOLLOWING:



1. Brief intro about you



2. Can you work the hours requested?



3. Complete this form: 
/
. Write in the subject line of your application: 1. Grammar score 2. Typing WPM 3. Numbers assessment answer (regarding achieving $2,000 profit)



5. In which coding languages do you have education or experience? (Javascript, HTML, CSS, Python, Database software, React Native, Open Claw, n8n, Zoho CRM , Zoho Deluge, or anything else?) 



Rate yourself from 1 to 10 in each (will verify later via coding tests)



• 1 = Super basic

• 10 = I'm an outlier. Could code this language as senior programmer at world's best tech company





The tests are quick  - only 10 multiple choice questions each. 



Don't cheat. Don't get help. Don't ask A.I. 



It won't work, because later there will be a timed, supervised exam that will ensure no other tools or help is used.



So the best path now is just to take this quick test once and submit your honest, real, result without getting help. 



Respond with the score of each test you took. 



7. What is your competitive requested monthly payment for this full-time position?





(Don't
 me off the platform or message on social media - your application will be disqualified. Don't worry, I personally check every application here)



Looking forward to meeting you!









---------

title: Graphic Designer & GHL Funnel / Website Builder
description:
Got it! Here's your updated job description with the commission structure baked in, tailored to your tax business context:

JOB TITLE Graphic Designer & GHL Website / Funnel Builder

JOB DESCRIPTION

We are a growing tax business that onboards new tax professionals who each need a custom website built inside GoHighLevel (GHL). We are looking for a creative and technically skilled designer who can consult with each client, capture their vision, and deliver a website they are genuinely proud of.

This is not a template-and-done role. You will speak directly with tax professionals, understand their brand, their audience, and their goals — then build something clean, modern, and conversion-focused inside GHL that reflects who they are.

You must be able to:

Build full websites and landing pages inside GoHighLevel

Replicate or build from scratch with accuracy and clean design

Create supporting graphics — logos, banners, branding elements

Consult clients to extract their vision and translate it into design

Follow SOPs and onboarding processes exactly

Communicate clearly and provide updates throughout each build

Deliver polished, professional work with zero hand-holding required

Compensation: This role pays an hourly base rate plus a commission per completed website. The more clients you onboard and deliver for, the more you earn. As our client base grows, so does your workload and income potential. This is a long-term opportunity with real growth built in.

GHL experience is required. Do not apply if you have not built websites or funnels inside the GoHighLevel platform.

title: Virtual Project Manager (Social Media Growth + Digital Program Launch)
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented Virtual Project Manager to oversee and execute operations across a growing physician-led brand in primary care, metabolic health, and aesthetics.



This role focuses on two core areas:



1. Scaling social media growth and content systems

2. Supporting the development and launch of a coaching program



You will work directly with a board-certified internal medicine physician and content creator with an established audience across Instagram and TikTok.





RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Social Media Operations & Growth



* Build and manage a weekly content calendar aligned with growth and conversion goals

* Track performance metrics (engagement, saves, follows, conversions)

* Identify high-performing content patterns and recommend optimizations

* Coordinate with video editor/VA to ensure timely content delivery

* Organize content workflows (Notion or similar tools)

* Assist in repurposing content across platforms



2. Funnel & Audience Conversion



* Help implement lead generation strategies (DM automation, comment triggers, link-in-bio flows)

* Support creation and organization of lead magnets (guides, checklists, resources)

* Map content, call-to-action, conversion pathways

* Monitor and improve conversion performance



3. Coaching Program Setup



* Assist in structuring a digital coaching program (format, modules, delivery flow)

* Coordinate backend setup (platform, onboarding, payments, workflows)

* Organize program materials and timelines

* Support launch planning (pre-launch, launch, post-launch)



4. Project & Operations Management



* Create and maintain project timelines and deadlines

* Delegate tasks and follow up with tea
mbers (VA, editor, etc.)

* Ensure projects move forward efficiently without delays

* Identify inefficiencies and recommend process improvements



IDEAL CANDIDATE



* Strong experience in project management for online businesses or creators

* Familiarity with social media growth strategies (Instagram & TikTok)

* Experience with digital products, coaching programs, or online course launches

* Highly organized and proactive (does not need constant direction)

* Comfortable working with tools like Notion, Google Drive, and scheduling platforms

* Strong communication and follow-up skills



Bonus:



* Experience in healthcare, wellness, or fitness space

* Familiarity with ManyChat or similar automation tools

* Understanding of audience growth and conversion funnels



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



* Consistent, organized content output with improved performance

* Clear systems for tracking content and growth

* Functional lead generation and conversion pathways

* A structured, ready-to-launch coaching program

* Reduced operational burden on the physician/creator



TIME COMMITMENT



* Part-time (10–20 hours/week to start)

* Potential to grow into a long-term role



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:



* Examples of projects you’ve managed (especially social media or digital products)

* Tools you’ve used (Notion, Kajabi, etc.)

* A brief explanation of how you would improve a social media workflow for a creator



To confirm attention to detail, include the word ‘growth systems’ in your application.

title: Detail Detective – Video Transaction Reviewer
description:
Job Summary

The Transaction Auditor is responsible for accurately processing customer purchase transactions across all market locations. This role involves reviewing video footage to verify items taken, encoding items into the system with correct quantities, and ensuring that all daily transactions are completed with precision and consistency.



This position requires strong attention to detail, high levels of focus, patience for repetitive tasks, and a strong sense of accountability.



Key Responsibilities

- Review video footage to verify customer purchases.

- Identify items taken and accurately encode them into the system, including correct quantities.

- Process transactions efficiently, averaging 1 to 2 minutes per transaction.

- Ensure all transactions for the assigned shift or day are completed.

- Flag inconsistencies, discrepancies, and any other i
.

- Escalate and report irregularities, suspicious activity, or system issues promptly.

- Maintain high accuracy levels, especially when distinguishing between similar-looking items.

- Ensure consistent attendance and availability during assigned working hours.

- Follow established procedures and maintain confidentiality of footage and transaction data.





Qualifications

- High attention to detail and strong visual accuracy.

- Ability to maintain focus for extended periods.

- Patient and comfortable performing repetitive tasks throughout the day.

- Strong sense of responsibility and commitment to completing daily workload.

- Ability to detect inconsistencies and exercise sound judgment.

- Basic computer proficiency and ability to quickly learn transaction systems.

- Strong integrity and reliability.

- Good written and verbal communication skills for reporting issues.

- Must demonstrate consistent attendance and punctuality.





Preferred Attributes

- Experience in transaction processing, auditing, or retail operations is an advantage.

- Experience reviewing CCTV footage is a plus.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

- Strong organizational and time management skills.



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do all of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

3. Add the Letters "TA" in the "What's your full name" field [E.g. TA - John Doe], so we know what role you are applying for.

title: Part Time Virtual Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant (Part-Time, Remote)

I’m looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support day-to-day operations in my jewellery business. This role is task-based, structured, and can grow over time as you become familiar with the systems.

This role starts at approximately 5 hours per week, with the potential to increase based on quality of work and ability to take on additional responsibilities.

Please read the full job description and all instructions below before responding.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



1. Receipt Tracking and Filing

• Receive receipt photos via WhatsApp and though montitoring Zoho Mail inbox

• Enter receipt details into a Google spreadsheet 

• Upload and organize receipt images in OneDrive 

• Keep records updated weekly 

• Receipts may be filed as they come in or completed in a weekly batch 



2. Order Entry and Management

• Log into external systems to retrieve order details 

• Enter orders into Shopify 

• Input consignment orders from photos and
s into Shopify 

• Apply consignment discounts 

• Adjust pricing where needed to match actual sale values 

• Make sure the correct taxes are applied 



3.
 Setup in Klaviyo

• Build
 campaigns in Klaviyo using provided content and templates 

• Add and link buttons, images, and products correctly 

• Ensure
s are formatted cleanly and ready to send 



4. Product and Collection Setup in Shopify

• Create new products and collections in Shopify 

• Upload images and organize listings 

• Draft product descriptions using provided GPT tools 

• Edit content so it sounds natural, human, and on-brand 

• Add SEO alt text to images 

• Draft SEO meta descriptions using provided GPT tools 



5. Basic Canva Content Creation

• Create simple branded graphics in Canva using provided templates 

• Follow existing brand fonts, colours, and layout styles 

• Use screenshots, examples, or rough ideas as direction 

• Turn provided ideas into clean, on-brand content 

• Keep designs simple, polished, and consistent  





How We’ll Work Together

• I will provide step by step Loom training videos for each task 

• You are expected to ask questions when something is unclear 

• You will take notes from these videos, and build your own reference documents, checklists and SOPs 

• We will meet periodically over Zoom ( at a time that works for both of us) to discuss any problems, or go over anything    that requires further explaining, and to check in on how you are learning. 

• Most tasks require novice-level skills to start 

• As your skills grow and you can take on more responsibility, hours and compensation can increase 

• Over time, there is an opportunity to take a more active role in content creation, including helping write
 campaigns rather than only setting them up 

• You can work whichever hours suit you 

• I do not expect you to work overnight due to time differences 

• I do not expect you to reply while you are asleep 

• For non-urgent tasks, a reply the following day is fine 



Tools We’ll Use

• WhatsApp 

• Google Sheets 

• Google Docs 

• OneDrive 

• Shopify 

• Klaviyo 

• Canva 

• ChatGPT 

• Zoom

• Zoho Mail



Hours and Payment

• Approximately 5 hours per week to start 

• Hours may increase based on the quality of work and expanded responsibilities 

• You are required to track your time and submit a basic itemized breakdown of tasks and time 

• Time tracking should be submitted in a Google Sheet 

• The Google Sheet may also be used as a shared task tracker and checklist 

• You are responsible for submitting invoices 

• Payment will be made within 3 days of receiving your invoice 

• Payment will include up to 1 hour of additional pay to help cover PayPal fees 

• Weekly payment to start, with the intention to move to bi-weekly payments once trust has been established 

• Payment methods: Wise or PayPal 



What I’m Looking For:

• Strong attention to detail 

• Someone who can take constructive criticism and is committed to learning 

• Someone who can learn from mistakes and use them as opportunities to improve 

• Comfortable following step-by-step processes

• Organized and reliable with weekly tasks 

• Able to edit AI-generated content into a natural, human tone 

• Willing to learn and improve systems over time 

• Someone who can grow with me, take initiative, and will not need continued instructions for the same weekly tasks. 



How to Apply

• Please respond with the following subject line: Application for part-time VA 

• Please use 2 application points to apply 

• Tell me what experience you have with the tools listed above and the job duties described 

• Tell me your hourly rate expectations 

• Tell me when you can start

title: Video Editor for Social Media (Gym, Fashion / Cinematic Content)
description:
Job Description:



I am looking for a creative and skilled Video Editor to produce high-quality, engaging short-form videos for social media (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube). Our content focuses on gym workouts, fitness lifestyle, and fashion styling.



You will be provided with Raw video frame to edite and create a short video content. 



With the rapid advancement of AI and automation in video editing, we are seeking a smart and resourceful candidate who can leverage AI tools to improve efficiency and deliver high-quality results quickly.



The ideal candidate should be able to use AI-powered solutions for tasks such as color correction, color grading, editing, and workflow optimization to complete projects in a timely manner without compromising quality.

Apple iPhone

title: Claude Code Agent / Automation Expert
description:
We are building a scalable machine that continuously detects, analyzes, and transforms the best-performing creatives in the market into our own high-performing ads.



For this role, we are looking for a specialist who can design and build a system consisting of two collaborating agents: a research agent and a creative agent, powered by Claude and integrated with advanced creative tooling.



Bot 1: Creative Research Agent (Competition & Analysis)



The goal of this agent is to continuously monitor the market and identify best-performing creatives from competitors.



This bot analyzes advertising platforms and funnels to detect which creatives are currently performing best within specific niches. The focus is on collecting visuals, hooks, copy, and formats, and identifying patterns that drive performance.



In addition, this agent structures all collected data and enriches it with insights. This includes understanding why a specific ad works, which elements consistently appear, and how these creatives can be categorized.



The output of this bot is a continuous stream of winning creatives, including structured data and analysis that can be directly used by the second agent.



Bot 2: Creative Replication Agent (AI Creative Engine)



This agent works directly with Bot 1 and uses its output to reproduce creatives in our own style.



The focus is on analyzing the structure of successful ads and translating them into new creatives using tools such as Nanobanana and Higgsfield.



This bot automatically generates new visuals, rewrites copy, and creates variations that are ready for A/B testing. It also handles bulk duplication of creatives and automatically stores them in the correct content folder, making them immediately usable for campaigns.



The output of this bot is a scalable stream of brand-consistent ads based on proven concepts from the market.



Collaboration between Bot 1 and Bot 2



The system functions as a continuous pipeline:



-- Bot 1 detects what works in the market

-- Bot 1 structures and analyzes this information

-- Bot 2 uses this input to reconstruct creatives in our own brand style

-- Bot 2 generates variations and stores them automatically



The result is a self-improving system that continuously produces new creatives based on real-time market data.



What you will build



You will design and implement the full architecture of this system. This includes the data flow between both agents, automation of workflows, and integration with creative tools.



You are also expected to go beyond standard solutions. You should be capable of building custom systems when needed and independently selecting the right tools and technologies to achieve the desired outcome.



We are fully open to your recommendations regarding tooling, infrastructure, and setup. If needed, we can also provide hardware such as a Mac mini to support your workflows.



Profile



We are looking for someone with experience in building automated systems and working with AI agents such as Claude. You think in systems and pipelines rather than isolated tasks.



You have strong affinity with AI and creative tooling and understand what differentiates high-performing ads from average ones. You are not dependent on existing tools and are capable of building custom solutions when necessary.



You take ownership of the entire system and are comfortable operating in an environment focused on speed, experimentation, and output.



Interest



We are not looking for someone who only thinks along, but someone who can actually build this.



Share examples of systems, automations, or agents you have developed.

title: Meta Ads Video Editor AI-Augmented (Dutch DTC Brand)
description:
WHO WE ARE

E&C Heaters is a premium Dutch outdoor heating brand selling design-led

pellet stoves direct-to-consumer. We've done €80K+ in revenue and are

now scaling our Meta ads aggressively for the 2026 season. We follow

modern performance-creative frameworks (Andromeda algorithm-aware,

Perdriau-style concept diversity) and are building a high-volume

creative production system powered by AI tools.



THE ROLE

You'll produce 25-35 new ad creatives per month for our Meta campaigns —

a mix of video edits, AI-augmented formats, and static ads. Scripts and

voiceovers are in DUTCH (we write the scripts; you generate the AI

voices in Dutch via ElevenLabs). All your work and communication with

us is in ENGLISH.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY MAKE EACH WEEK

- Hook variants on existing UGC footage (new 3-sec openers + CTAs)

- AI-VO versions of existing videos using ElevenLabs (multiple voice

  profiles per video)

- AI-podcast-style ad clips (NotebookLM-style 2-voice dialogue format)

- AI-comparison videos (Runway/Veo 3 generated b-roll + motion graphics)

- Static ads (Midjourney + Canva + your own design)

- Iterations and refreshes on winning ads



TOOLS YOU MUST KNOW (non-negotiable)

- CapCut Pro or Adobe Premiere

- ElevenLabs (you'll generate Dutch voiceovers — voice selection matters)

- Runway Gen-3 OR Veo 3 (AI video generation for b-roll)

- Midjourney or comparable (AI image generation for statics)

- After Effects OR motion graphics in CapCut Pro

- Canva (for static ads)



WHAT MAKES YOU A FIT

- 3+ years editing for performance/social ads (NOT primarily YouTube

  long-form content)

- Real production experience with AI tools — not just experiments

- You understand 9:16 vertical, hook-first structure, sound-off

  captions, Reels UI safe zones

- You can produce volume without dropping quality

- You're comfortable with fast iteration cycles — multiple versions,

  A/B variants, weekly refreshes

- You execute briefs without needing micromanagement

- You can genuinely commit 20 hours/week (not "I'll fit you in

  between 4 other clients")

- You're available for occasional extra hours during launch weeks

  (paid separately)



WHAT MAKES YOU NOT A FIT

- You primarily do "cinematic" or wedding/event-style editing

- You haven't actually shipped work using AI tools

- You need weeks per project — we work in days

- You can't show a portfolio with social/Meta ads (not just YouTube reels)



HOURS & PAY

- Part-time, 20 hours/week to start

- $5/hour USD (~$430/month)

- Additional paid hours available during launch weeks and seasonal

  peaks (spring + autumn for our category)

- 90-day review with rate increase to $5.50-6/hour based on output

  quality and consistency

- Real growth path: as our ad spend scales, this role can grow into

  full-time

- Long-term role: we're building this for the next 2-3 years



TO APPLY — READ CAREFULLY

Send us:

1. Your portfolio link — must include Meta/social ads, not just YouTube

2. One specific example of an AI-augmented video you've personally made

   (any brand, any product — what matters is YOUR work)

3. A 150-word answer to this question:

   "What's the difference between creative ITERATION and creative

   VARIATION in Meta ads, and why does it matter for the algorithm?"



Applications missing any of the three will be ignored. We're looking

for someone who reads instructions carefully — that's part of the job.

-Create/manage projects in Quo

-Process listings in Aryeo

-Track jobs in 

-Organize files in Dropbox

-Communicate with team via Slack

-Record/update SOPs using Loom



Internal Coordination:

-Ensure photographers have complete shoot details

-Relay notes to editing team accurately

-Flag conflicts, risks, or issues early

-Coordinate across teams to keep jobs moving



What We’re Looking For



You are:

-Extremely organized and detail-oriented

-Fast and clear communicator (written English must be strong)

-Proactive (you don’t wait to be told what’s wrong)

-Comfortable managing multiple tools and workflows

-Calm under pressure and good at prioritizing



Bonus if you have:

-Experience in scheduling/logistics/dispatch

-Experience in real estate or media production

-Familiarity with tools like Monday, Slack, Dropbox, CRMs



What Success Looks Like

-Bookings are accurate and complete (no missing details)

-Photographers show up fully prepared

-Clients get fast, clear communication

-Problems (weather, conflicts) are handled before they escalate

-Operations run smoothly without constant oversight



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



We only review applications that follow instructions.



Include the following:

1. A short intro (3–5 sentences max)

2. Your relevant experience (specific to scheduling, operations, or coordination)

3. Answers to the screening questions below

4. Your favorite productivity tool and why



At the top of your application, include this phrase:



“I am detail-oriented and proactive.”



Applications without this will be ignored.



Screening Questions (Required):

1. A client books a shoot but forgets to include key details (property access, exact address, or services). What steps do you take?

2. You have 5 shoots scheduled in one day, and 2 photographers call out sick. What do you do?

3. A shoot is scheduled, but weather conditions (rain/wind) will affect quality. The client hasn’t noticed. How do you handle it?

4. You notice a booking was confirmed in a restricted drone area. What actions do you take?

5. Describe a time you improved a workflow or caught a mistake before it became a problem.

6. What tools have you used for scheduling, coordination, or project management?

7. What would you do if a client is upset about a scheduling mistake?



Final Notes



We are looking for someone long-term who can grow with the company. If you are reliable, proactive, and take ownership of your work, this role will expand.



If you’re just looking for simple tasks to complete, this is not the right fit.

title: Setup gohighlevel.com account (no VA firms)
description:
Job Title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist – Full Account Setup & Funnel Build

Job Overview

I am looking for a seasoned GoHighLevel Expert to help me build out my sub-account from scratch. I need someone who doesn't just know where the buttons are, but understands how to build high-converting systems, clean automations, and professional-grade websites.



Key Responsibilities

Account Foundation: Connect custom domains, set up SMTP (Mailgun/LC
), integrate Twilio/LeadConnector, and configure WP/Calendar integrations.



Websites & Funnels: Build out a high-converting multi-step funnel and a 4-5 page website (including SEO metadata and mobile optimization).



Automations (Workflows): Create "Recipes" for lead nurture, appointment reminders, and missed call text-back.



Snapshot Implementation: Customizing existing snapshots or building a custom one for my specific niche.



Pipeline Management: Setting up CRM stages and lead scoring.



Required Skills

Proven GHL Experience: You must have handled at least 3-5 full account setups previously.



Design Eye: Ability to create clean, modern UI/UX within the GHL page builder.



Technical Troubleshooting: Expertise in DNS settings (CNAME, A Records, MX Records).



API Knowledge: (Optional but a plus) Experience with Zapier/Make for external integrations.



Deliverables

A fully functional, white-labeled sub-account.



Live website and funnel with tested forms and surveys.



Automated
/SMS sequences for new leads.



A 15-minute "Handover" video walkthrough (Loom) explaining the setup.



How to Apply

Please start your application with the word "Automation" so I know you read this. Include:



A link to a GHL site/funnel you personally built.



Your favorite GHL feature and why.



Your estimated timeline for a full setup.



Pro-Tips for the Hiring Process:

Ask for a Portfolio: Many people claim to be "GHL Experts" but just use pre-made, ugly snapshots. Ensure their design aesthetic matches your brand.



Verification: During the interview, ask them to explain the difference between a Trigger Link and a Custom Value. If they can't answer that, they aren't an expert.



Scope Creep: Be clear if you need them to write the copy (text) for the site, or if you will provide it. Usually, GHL experts build the tech, while copywriters handle the words.

title: Outbound Sales Representative
description:
About Genacom

Genacom is a 25-year-old managed website services agency based in Napa, California, serving 500+ client websites across the United States over the years. We modernize outdated business websites and run them on a flat monthly fee — no setup costs, no surprise invoices, no fine print. Our clients are US small and mid-sized businesses in medical, legal, home services, and professional services.  We aren’t selling websites; we are selling monthly services. 

We are scaling our 2026 outbound growth program and hiring a sharp, self-directed Sales Representative based in the Philippines to drive qualified pipeline and learn the close alongside our senior team.



Please review 
 for addtional information. 



About the Role

This role is the front of our outbound engine. Genacom’s research team identifies and qualifies US small business prospects, and our proprietary AI tool (Genacom-m40) automatically produces a personalized website audit report and a fully modernized demo site for each prospect before the prospect ever reaches your queue.

Your job is to use those pre-built assets to open conversations with US small business owners, run disciplined follow-up cadences, book qualified meetings, and join those meetings on Zoom alongside a senior Genacom sales lead. You will not be closing solo on day one. You learn the close by sitting in on real deals — contributing prospect context during the call, taking detailed notes, and owning the post-call follow-up that moves deals across the line. As you grow into the role, you take on more of the call yourself, with a direct path to running closes independently.



What You’ll Do

Receive a steady queue of qualified US small-med business prospects — each with a new, modernized, personalized website that is far superior of their current one, an audit report and already prepared for you

Send personalized cold
 and LinkedIn outreach using those pre-built assets as conversation openers

You will have your own USA-based phone number to call from to schedule those Zoom calls and to receive calls. 

Run multi-touch follow-up calls for correspondence — most replies come on 4 to 7 attempts, not on the first try, usually ever. 

Book qualified discovery and sales calls onto our senior team’s calendar.  The goal is to schedule closing Zoom calls. 

Join sales calls via Zoom alongside a senior closer — contributing prospect context, taking detailed notes, and learning the close in real time. 



Own post-call follow-up: send recap
s, surface proposal questions, and drive deals across the finish line. 

Track all activity, conversations, and pipeline status accurately in our CRM. 

Hit weekly outreach, meeting, and pipeline targets, and report results in a brief weekly check-in with the founder. 



Who You Are

2+ years of outbound B2B sales or BDR experience selling to US-based prospects

Excellent written and spoken English — neutral or American accent strongly preferred

Comfortable on Zoom with US business owners: quiet workspace, good camera, good lighting, professional video presence

Active listener with strong note-taking discipline — you can capture what matters in a sales call and surface the right detail at the right 
nt



Comfortable with daily overlap into US Pacific Time business hours

Strong written communication — you can write a cold
 that does not look like a cold

Tech-comfortable: CRMs, Google Workspace, Zoom, Loom

Self-directed, organized, and metrics-driven — you do not need someone watching you work

Resilient — you treat “no” as data, not rejection

Bonus: experience selling web design, digital marketing, SaaS, or agency services to US SMBs



Compensation

This is a salaried role with performance-based bonuses on top. We do not pay commission on closed deals. We do reward the activity and output that drive pipeline.

Performance bonuses tied to: qualified meetings booked and held, qualified pipeline generated, and deals closed where you sourced the opportunity. Targets and bonus amounts are set in advance and paid monthly.

Paid Philippines public holidays

100% remote — work from home, fully equipped

Direct mentorship from a 25-year veteran agency operator

Proprietary AI sales tooling (Genacom-m40) that produces demos and audits for you, so you can focus on conversations rather than production work

Clear path into senior closing roles for top performers

Schedule

Full-time, 40 hours per week. Some daily overlap with US Pacific Time business hours is required for outreach calls and team coordination. We will work with you to set a sustainable shift — we are not asking you to work full graveyard. Most reps work a split shift or a morning-Manila / afternoon-PT block.



How to Apply

Send a brief intro video (90 seconds maximum) covering two things:

Why you would be effective at outbound sales to US small businesses

One US-based small business website you think looks outdated, and what you would say in a cold
 to that owner. 

At the Beginning of each video, “I’m applying for the Genacom Sales Position.”



Must have strong English language and a US accent.  



Subject line: “Genacom BDR – [Your Name]”

We review every submission. Strong applicants will be invited to a 30-minute video interview followed by a paid trial week.

title: Book Cover Illustrator
description:
ABOUT

We're looking for a talented Book Cover Illustrator to create unique, high-quality illustrated book covers. These covers will be used in multiple formats, so they must be versatile and available in different sizes and layouts.

eBook (digital)

Paperback

Hardcover

Send a link to your resume and relevant experience.

title: Property Management VA
description:
Property Management VA – Repairs, Renovations, Leasing Oversight (Part-Time, U.S. Real Estate)



Overview:

- We’re hiring a part-time Virtual Assistant to support a U.S.-based real estate business managing 35+ residential rental properties. Your primary responsibilities will include:

- Posting repair jobs and screening vendors

- Tracking repair and renovation progress

- Following up with contractors until jobs are complete

- Monitoring leasing activity through our automated system (Tenant Turner)

- Following up with rental prospects to ensure showings, applications, and move-ins stay on track

- Assisting with collections and sending late rent notices

- Communicating with tenants regarding maintenance and leasing issues



You’ll act as an operational partner—not a general VA—helping keep repairs, leasing, and tenant communication on track. This role requires someone organized, assertive, and confident under pressure, especially when dealing with contractor delays, resistant tenants, or urgent situations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Repairs & Maintenance Coordination

- Post and manage repair jobs to vendor networks

- Screen vendors and follow up on job completion

- Maintain contractor and vendor records



Renovation Oversight:

- Coordinate renovation timelines and schedules

- Communicate progress and escalate delays

- Leasing Oversight (via Tenant Turner)

- Monitor and follow up on leasing activity

- Track inquiries, ensure showings and applications move forward



Assist with coordinating move-ins:

- Collections Support

- Track and report on late payments

- Send notices and reminders

- Follow up on payment plans and compliance



Tenant Correspondence

- Respond to tenant updates related to maintenance, notices, or move-out

- Communicate clearly and respectfully, even in adversarial situations

- Marketing Support

- Post and update rental listings

- Maintain accuracy across platforms



Vendor Recruitment

-Build and manage a pipeline of qualified local repair vendors and contractors

- Requirements:

- Experience in real estate or property management (remote or local)

- Excellent spoken and written English

- Assertive, reliable, and calm under pressure

- Confident speaking with vendors, tenants, and uncooperative parties

- Highly organized with excellent follow-through

- Available 15–20 hours/week during U.S. business hours (Eastern Time)

- Fast internet and a quiet, professional work environment



Ideal Candidate:

- Has worked in leasing, renovations, maintenance coordination, or collections

- Understands what’s urgent and follows up until resolution

- Has a passion for real estate and is looking to grow in the industry

- Doesn’t need to be micromanaged and knows how to push for results



Compensation & Hours:

- Part-time: 15–20 hours/week



Pay: 

- Based on experience (20,000-30,000 PHP)

- Paid via Wise (twice per month)

- Performance-based raises over time

- Bonus Structure based on achieve milestone





To Apply Include:

- Summary of your real estate/property management experience

- Your current availability and expected monthly rate

- Short video introduction relating your experience to the role.  Applications without a short video will not be considered.

title: Discord Community Support Specialist
description:
About Divine: 



Divine is the largest and highest-rated paid reselling community on 
, with thousands of members who rely on us daily for real-time release alerts, sneaker drops, retail monitoring, and reselling guidance. We've served over 100,000 members and earned 4,500+ five-star reviews by being the most active, knowledgeable, and trusted community in the space.



We're hiring a full-time 
 Community Support Specialist to join our support team. This is a long-term role for someone who wants stability, room to grow, and a team that respects them.



Schedule: (Eastern Time, USA)



We are hiring for two distinct shifts. Please specify which shift you are applying for in your application. If you're flexible, you can apply for either.



Day Shift:

- Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday: 9am–6pm ET (9 hrs)

- Saturday: 10am–8pm ET (10 hrs)

- Sunday: OFF

- Total: 55 hrs/week



Late Shift:

- Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday: 6pm–3am ET (9 hrs)

- Sunday: 1pm–11pm ET (10 hrs)

- Saturday: OFF

- Total: 55 hrs/week



These shifts are fixed and non-negotiable. Please calculate what these hours mean in your local Philippine time zone before applying. The Late Shift maps to roughly 6am–3pm PHT (a daytime job for you). The Day Shift maps to roughly 9pm–6am PHT (a graveyard shift for you). Choose accordingly.



What You'll Do: 



You'll be the first point of contact for our members across 
, welcoming new sign-ups, answering questions, resolving support tickets, and engaging in main chat. Day-to-day responsibilities include:



- Welcoming new members as they join and helping them get oriented

- Responding to support tickets within 30 seconds during your shift

- Handling payment-related issues (failed payments, billing questions, subscription changes) with care and accuracy

- Engaging in main chat to answer member questions and keep the community active

- Checking the staff chat at the start of every shift for software updates, tool changes, and operational alerts

- Escalating complex issues to senior tea
mbers when needed

- Following our support scripts and SOPs while using good judgment



What We Require:



1. Speed. Our members expect a 30-second response time on tickets. If you're slow to respond or get distracted easily, this role will not work for you.



2. Rock-solid internet and power. This is non-negotiable. We've had too many VAs disappear mid-shift because of brownouts or weak connections. You need:

- Reliable home internet (minimum 25 Mbps download)

- A backup internet source (mobile data, second ISP, or pocket WiFi)

- A backup power solution (UPS, generator, or laptop with strong battery in a brownout-prone area)



If your area has frequent power or internet outages and you don't have backups in place, please don't apply. We will find out, and it wastes everyone's time.



3. Genuine product understanding. We don't want robots reading scripts. Once you're trained, you should actually understand what reselling is, what our members are trying to accomplish, and what tools they're using. Curiosity and willingness to learn the business matter more than experience.



4. Strong written English. You'll be writing to native English speakers all day. Your messages need to be clear, friendly, and professional, not stiff or overly formal.



5. 
 proficiency. You should already be comfortable using 
 (channels, threads, roles, tickets, DMs). If you've never

used 
 before, this role isn't for you.



6. Commitment to a 6-day work week, fixed shift. The hours above are not flexible. We need someone who can commit to this schedule long-term, not someone juggling three other jobs.



You're Probably NOT a Good Fit If...



- You take pride in being fast and accurate

- You enjoy helping people and solving problems

- You want a stable, long-term role with a team that values you

- You're proactive. You spot issues before they become problems

- You're hungry to learn and grow into more responsibility over time



Compensation: 



- $3/hour USD = approximately $165/week = approximately $715/month

- Paid weekly or bi-weekly via your preferred method (Wise, PayPal, etc.)

- 55 hours per week, 6 days/week

- Long-term role with room to grow as you prove yourself



How to Apply:



To show us you actually read this listing, please start your application with the word "service" as the first word of your message. Applications that don't start with service will be ignored.



In your application, please include:



1. The word "service" at the top

2. Which shift you're applying for (Day Shift or Late Shift) and confirm you've checked what those hours look like in PHT

3. A short intro about yourself and why you're interested in this role

4. Your internet speed test result (screenshot from speedtest.net)

5. Your backup internet and backup power setup (be specific)

6. Any prior experience with 
 communities, customer support, or reselling

7. Your available start date



We review applications daily and will reach out to candidates we'd like to interview.



Looking forward to meeting you.

title: Appointment Setter (High-Ticket Sales) – Remote
description:
Appointment Setter (High-Ticket Sales) – Remote



We are a fast-growing coaching and tech company helping high-achieving women transform their love lives through a proven, results-driven system. We are hiring a high-performance Appointment Setter to convert warm leads into booked, qualified calls.



This is not a passive role. We are looking for someone who can take ownership of conversations, move people to action, and consistently hit booking targets.





---



What You’ll Do



Call and message warm leads (inbound + nurtured) to book qualified calls



Follow up with leads via phone, SMS, and
 until a clear outcome is reached



Qualify prospects based on readiness, goals, and financial capacity



Overcome objections and guide prospects to take the next step



Accurately schedule appointments on the calendar with complete notes



Maintain CRM hygiene and track all outreach and results



Collaborate with closers to ensure a seamless handoff



Meet and exceed daily activity and booking targets







---



Daily Expectations



80–120 outbound dials per day



10–20 live conversations per day



3–5 qualified calls booked per day



Consistent follow-up with all assigned leads







---



Who You Are



Confident on the phone with strong presence and control of conversations



Persuasive communicator who can build trust quickly



Highly disciplined with strong work ethic and consistency



Resilient—handles rejection without slowing down



Organized and detail-oriented with strong follow-through



Coachable and open to feedback



Comfortable in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment







---



Requirements



Prior experience in appointment setting, sales, or call center environments



Fluent English (spoken and written)



Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment



Ability to work U.S. business hours







---



Compensation



Base pay + performance-based commissions



Bonuses for hitting and exceeding booking targets



Growth path into closing roles for top performers







---



This Role Is Not For You If



You are uncomfortable making high-volume calls



You need constant supervision or reminders



You avoid objections or difficult conversations



You are not driven by performance and results







---



What Makes This Role Valuable



Warm lead flow—no cold prospecting from scratch



Proven scripts and systems



Direct impact on revenue and growth



Opportunity to scale income based on performance







---



How to Apply



Send the following to 
 :



1. A short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and your experience





2. Your resume





3. A brief summary of your past results (calls made, bookings, or sales metrics)







Subject line: Appointment Setter – Ready to Book

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor (Remote – Philippines)

U.S.-Based Outdoor Gear Brand

We’re a fast-growing outdoor gear company creating products for people who feel more at home in the mountains, on the water, and off the grid than they do indoors. From backcountry hunts to cold mornings at camp, our brand lives in real-world adventure — and we’re looking for a Video Editor who can bring those stories to life.

This role is ideal for someone who loves pacing, emotion, and visual storytelling just as much as clean cuts and color.



About the Role

You’ll be a key part of our creative team, turning raw field footage into compelling stories that move people — whether that’s a product launch film, a social reel, or a YouTube mini-doc. You’ll collaborate daily with our U.S.-based creative leads and marketing team while working remotely from the Philippines.

We move fast, care about craft, and believe great editing is invisible — until it hits you in the chest.



What You’ll Do

• Edit high-quality video content for:

Social media (short-form, vertical, performance-driven)

YouTube and brand storytelling films

Product launches and campaigns

Paid ads and performance marketing

• Shape story from raw footage, not just assemble cuts

• Select music, build pacing, and enhance emotional tone

• Perform color correction and basic color grading

• Clean up and mix dialogue, natural sound, and music

• Add motion graphics, titles, and simple visual effects when needed

• Organize and manage media, project files, and exports

• Create multiple cutdowns and format variations for different platforms

• Collaborate across time zones with U.S. creative leadership

• Take feedback well and iterate quickly



What We’re Looking For

Must-Haves

3+ years professional video editing experience

Strong portfolio showing storytelling ability (not just flashy cuts)

Must be able to work U.S. Mountain Time hours primarily (9:00am to 5:00pm Mountain Time) with flexible schedule opportunities after training period

Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro

Working knowledge of After EffectsSolid understanding of pacing, rhythm, and emotional storytellingExperience editing outdoor, lifestyle, documentary, or product contentStrong English communication skills (written and spoken)Ability to work independently and hit deadlines without hand-holdingReliable high-speed internet and professional remote setupBig Pluses

Experience with outdoor, hunting, camping, or adventure brandsColor grading experience (Lumetri or DaVinci a bonus)Sound design skillsUnderstanding of social media performance editing (hooks, retention, etc.)Experience working with U.S.-based teams



You’re a Great Fit If You…

Can turn messy field footage into a clear, emotional storyKnow when to let a shot breathe — and when to cut fastCare about tiny details most people never noticeUnderstand that editing is storytelling, not just softwareTake direction well but also bring your own creative instinctsLove the outdoors (even if you’re editing it from your desk)



What You’ll Get

Long-term remote role with a growing U.S. outdoor brandConsistent, ongoing project workCreative team that values craft and storytellingOpportunity to work on meaningful, real-world adventure content



How to Apply

Please submit:

Your portfolio (REQUIRED — applications without samples will not be considered)A short note about your editing style and experienceYour software proficiency and internet speedYour availability (hours per week)

Must apply with 8 apply points

Must submit a resume



If you know how to make someone feel the cold morning air, the weight of a pack, or the quiet before sunrise — we want to see your work.

title: Facebook Investor Outreach Specialist for Texas Real Estate Portfolio
description:
Facebook Investor Outreach Specialist for Texas Real Estate Portfolio





We are hiring a *
 Investor Outreach Specialist** to help market a Texas single-family rental portfolio and generate real buyer conversations.



This role is specifically focused on using *
 groups,
 Marketplace, and direct outreach** to help find:



* investors

* landlords

* cash buyers

* brokers

* real estate buyers



This is **not** a general social media role.

This is **not** a content creator role.

This is **not** a branding role.

This is **not** a VA role.



We want someone who already knows how to use
 as a serious outreach channel for real estate opportunities and can start quickly without needing to be taught from scratch.



You should already know where to find active investors, landlords, and buyer groups on
 and be comfortable posting, messaging, qualifying, following up, and tracking conversations.



### About the opportunity



We are selling a portfolio of **19 single-family homes** in the **Texarkana, Wake Village, and Nash, Texas** area, excluding one higher-priced outlier.



The portfolio includes:



* 8 leased, cash-flowing properties

* 5 vacant, move-in-ready properties

* 6 vacant properties that still need repairs or final work before move-in



Some of the vacant properties are also being leased up.



Most of the portfolio is in the **$89,000 to $249,000** range.



We are open to selling:



* individually

* in small groups

* in bundles

* or as a full portfolio



Your role is to help us use
 to get this opportunity in front of real buyers and generate qualified conversations.



### Responsibilities



* find relevant
 groups for real estate investors, landlords, buyers, and brokers

* write and post strong investor-focused deal posts

* use
 Marketplace when relevant

* respond to comments and direct messages

* proactively message potential buyers where appropriate

* qualify buyer interest

* keep conversations organized

* track leads and follow up

* report clearly on activity and results

* help move serious leads toward the next step



### What we want



You should already have experience with:



*
 groups for real estate outreach

*
 Marketplace for real estate outreach

* investor or landlord outreach

* lead qualification

* follow-up

* CRM or lead tracking

* real estate deal marketing or buyer outreach



### Strong plus if you already



* are active in investor or landlord
 groups

* know how to find real buyer groups fast

* understand how to write posts that get attention without sounding spammy

* can start quickly

* can show examples of similar work



### Not a fit if



* you are mainly a general social media manager

* you have no real estate outreach experience

* you have never used
 groups to find buyers or investors

* you only create content but do not handle conversations

* you cannot qualify leads or follow up professionally

* you need heavy hand-holding



### To apply, send



1. a short intro

2. your experience with
 real estate outreach

3. what types of buyers you have reached before

4. whether you are already active in investor
 groups

5. 2 to 3 examples of similar work

6. screenshots or proof if available

7. what your first 3 days would look like

8. your availability



Please do not send a generic response.



We are looking for someone who can help generate real buyer conversations through
, stay organized, and move quickly.



### Compensation



Open to **base pay plus performance bonus** based on results.



Bonus may be tied to:



* qualified buyer conversations

* serious buyer leads

* and/or properties sold

title: Staff Accountant
description:
ABOUT US

Legacy Home Builders is a construction and real estate company based in Hickory, North Carolina. We focus on developing and managing high-quality multifamily communities while building a strong portfolio of investment-class assets. Our team is committed to operational excellence, continuous improvement, and delivering long-term value through well-executed projects.



ROLE OVERVIEW

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Staff Accountant to support our day-to-day accounting operations. This role is ideal for someone who is strong in bookkeeping, enjoys working with numbers, and can maintain accurate financial records in a fast-paced environment. You will play a key role in supporting the finance team with reconciliations, reporting, and overall financial organization.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Maintain accurate financial records, including general ledger entries

- Perform bank and credit card reconciliations on a regular basis

- Assist with month-end close processes, including journal entries and account reviews

- Support accounts payable and accounts receivable processes

- Ensure proper documentation and organization of financial transactions

- Assist in preparing financial reports such as profit & loss and balance sheets

- Help maintain clean and accurate sub-ledgers

- Coordinate with internal teams to gather financial data as needed

- Identify discrepancies and resolve issues in a timely manner

- Support additional accounting and bookkeeping tasks as needed



QUALIFICATIONS

- At least 2 years of experience in accounting or bookkeeping

- CPA license is required

- Experience working in a CPA firm is an advantage

- Experience working with U.S.-based clients or companies is required

- Strong understanding of basic accounting principles

- Experience with QuickBooks or similar accounting software

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

- Ability to work independently and manage tasks efficiently

- Comfortable working in a remote environment

- Available to work in the U.S. Eastern Time Zone (EST)



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Strong problem-solving skills

- Proactive and dependable

- Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple priorities

- Team player with a positive and professional attitude



WHY JOIN LEGACY HOME BUILDERS

- Be part of a growing company in the construction and real estate industry

- Opportunity to contribute to both client experience and business growth

- Collaborative and supportive team environment

- Opportunity for growth as the company expands



HOW TO APPLY

If this sounds like a good fit for you, please complete our application form below:





Only candidates who complete the application form will be considered for the next step.

title: Wellness Advisor
description:
ABOUT US

IV Concierge is a premium mobile wellness company based in Delray Beach, Florida, specializing in IV therapy, vitamin injections, and personalized wellness treatments delivered directly to our clients.



We provide services designed to support hydration, energy, immunity, recovery, beauty, and overall wellness, all administered by licensed medical professionals in the comfort of our clients’ homes, hotels, or offices. Our focus is on delivering a seamless, high-quality, and personalized experience, from the first inquiry through post-treatment follow-up.



ROLE OVERVIEW

We are looking for a full-time Wellness Advisor who will play a key role in client communication, service coordination, and outreach. In this role, you will be the first point of contact for our clients, helping guide them through our services, recommending appropriate treatments, and ensuring a smooth and professional experience. You will also support business growth through client outreach and proactive engagement.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Serve as the primary point of contact for client inquiries via phone, text, and

- Assist clients with booking, rescheduling, and managing appointments

- Guide clients in selecting appropriate IV therapy treatments and wellness services based on their needs

- Clearly explain services, pricing, and what clients can expect during their appointment

- Conduct outbound outreach, including follow-ups, re-engagement of past clients, and lead nurturing

- Perform cold calls and proactive client outreach to generate bookings and build client relationships

- Coordinate schedules with dispatchers, nurses and the onsite team to ensure smooth operations

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records in the EMR system

- Support client retention through consistent communication and service recommendations

- Assist with administrative tasks related to bookings, scheduling, and client management

- Ensure every interaction reflects professionalism, responsiveness, and high-quality service

- Support additional wellness or sales-related tasks and responsibilities as needed



QUALIFICATIONS

- Experience in customer service, healthcare coordination, sales, or a similar role preferred

- Experience working with U.S.-based clients or companies is required

- Comfortable with outbound calling, client outreach, and sales-oriented tasks

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

- Organized, detail-oriented, and able to multitask effectively

- Comfortable using EMR systems, CRM tools, and scheduling platforms

- Ability to work in a fast-paced, client-focused environment

- Must be able to work on shifting schedules, including evenings and weekends, aligned with U.S. Eastern Time (EST)



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Strong problem-solving and decision-making skills

- Ability to stay calm and focused under pressure

- Proactive and dependable

- Team player with a customer-first mindset



WHY JOIN IV CONCIERGE

- Be part of a growing company in the wellness and healthcare space

- Opportunity to contribute to both client experience and business growth

- Collaborative and supportive team environment

- Opportunity for growth as the company expands



HOW TO APPLY

title: Senior AI Automation Developer (Python, n8n & Claude Code Expert)
description:
The Vision

We are looking for a highly skilled Developer and AI Automation Architect to join our core team and lead the design, development, and implementation of advanced, AI-driven automation systems and AI Agents.



This role is not just about connecting tools; it requires a true software developer at heart. If you write clean code, possess a deep understanding of AI agent architectures, have hands-on experience with n8n and Python, and already leverage modern AI coding tools like Claude Code to build faster and smarter—we want you on our team.



Responsibilities

AI Agent Architecture & Build: Design, build, and deploy autonomous AI agents and complex, highly reliable automation workflows using n8n and custom code.



Custom Python Development: Write, test, and maintain advanced Python scripts to handle complex data manipulation, custom API integrations, and backend processes that go beyond standard out-of-the-box node capabilities.



Claude Code-Driven Development: Actively leverage Claude Code to develop, debug, and optimize code, automation processes, and AI logic, ensuring rapid and high-quality deployment.



System Integration: Connect third-party tools, SaaS platforms, databases, and CRMs via REST APIs, Webhooks, and OAuth.



Optimization & Maintenance: Implement robust error handling (crucial for LLM outputs), logging, retries, and performance optimization for all code and workflows.



Business Alignment: Translate business requirements and operational bottlenecks into technical, scalable, and AI-powered automation logic.



Requirements (Must-Haves)

Software Development Background: Proven experience as a developer with a strong understanding of software engineering principles, clean code practices, and system architecture.



Deep Understanding of AI & AI Agents: Strong conceptual and practical knowledge of how Large Language Models (LLMs) work, prompting engineering, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), and how to orchestrate multi-agent workflows.



Python Mastery: Strong, hands-on experience writing efficient and production-ready Python code. (Strict requirement)



Claude Code Expertise: Proven, hands-on experience using Claude Code for development, scripting, and building AI-assisted automations. (Strict requirement)



n8n Mastery: Extensive experience building, deploying, and maintaining n8n workflows in a production environment. (Strict requirement)



Technical Foundation: Deep understanding of APIs (REST), Webhooks, JSON, complex data structures, and conditional routing.



Mindset: High ownership, responsibility, and strong analytical problem-solving skills. Ability to work independently in a remote environment.



Nice to Have

JavaScript / Node.js Proficiency: Highly preferred for building custom n8n nodes or handling specific JS-based tasks.



Ecosystem Experience: Experience integrating various AI APIs (OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, etc.).



Advanced Integrations: Experience working with WhatsApp APIs or advanced CRM integrations.



Background: Previous experience working in a SaaS company, AI startup, or an automation agency.



Alternative Platforms: Familiarity with other automation platforms like Make (Integromat) or Zapier (as a secondary skill to n8n).

title: Shopify SEO Specialist & Product Listing VA
description:
I run a growing women's fashion e-commerce store. I'm looking for an experienced Shopify SEO specialist who can also handle product listing — someone who understands both the technical and content sides of SEO and can apply that knowledge directly to product pages and blog content.



This is a long-term position with real growth potential. As we scale to multiple stores, the right person will grow with the business.



About The Role:



Right now I have 320+ products on the store and I'm importing 50-100 new products every week. Every product needs to be properly optimized for search — not just uploaded. At the same time, the store needs a full SEO audit, technical fixes, and ongoing content to build organic traffic alongside my paid Google Ads campaigns.



What You'll Be Doing::



SEO (Primary Focus):



- Run a full store SEO audit using SEOWILL (SEOAnt) and fix all identified issues

- Write optimized meta titles and descriptions for all existing and new products

- Add proper alt text to all product images

- Conduct keyword research for women's fashion categories (dresses, loafers, sandals, activewear, etc.)

- Optimize product titles and descriptions for target keywords

- Fix broken links and 404 errors

- Set up and monitor Google Search Console

- Write 2-3 SEO-optimized blog posts per week (e.g., "Best Summer Maxi Dresses 2026", "How to Style Loafers")

- Monitor keyword rankings monthly and report progress

- Keep the store technically healthy — speed, indexing, structured data

- Teach me what you're doing and why as we go — I want to learn



Product Listing (Secondary Focus):



- Import 10-20 new products per day

- Write SEO-optimized product titles and descriptions following our brand format (training provided)

- Set up product variants correctly — assign images to each color variant

- Add size charts to every product

- Organize products into correct collections

- Update status in our Google Sheets tracking system



**Requirements — Must Have:**



- Proven Shopify SEO experience — show me real results (stores you've ranked, keywords you've improved)

- Experience with SEOWILL (SEOAnt) or similar Shopify SEO apps

- Experience with Google Search Console

- Strong understanding of on-page SEO — meta tags, alt text, keyword placement, URL structure

- Experience writing SEO-optimized content in English for US audiences

- Experience with Shopify product listing — variants, collections, meta fields

- Good written English — descriptions and blog posts need to read naturally for US customers

- Organized, reliable, and proactive — can work independently without micromanagement

- Available full-time or part-time minimum 4-6 hours per day



Nice to Have:



- Experience with Google Keyword Planner or Ahrefs/Semrush

- Fashion or apparel e-commerce experience

- Understanding of technical SEO — page speed, Core Web Vitals, structured data



What We're NOT Looking For:



- Someone who just installs an app and calls it SEO

- Someone who stuffs keywords without understanding search intent

- Someone who can't show proof of actual SEO results

- Someone who needs to be reminded to do their daily tasks



Growth Opportunity:



We're scaling to 15 stores by Q4 2026. The right person will become our Head of SEO — managing SEO across all stores and potentially training junior tea
mbers. This is a ground-floor opportunity if you're someone who wants to build a career, not just a job.



Working Conditions:



- Remote position

- Part-time to start (4-6 hours/day) with potential to go full-time

- Flexible hours — daily availability required

- Long-term position for the right candidate



Compensation:

I’m willing to pay $3 an hour as starting.



How to Apply:



Please include in your application:



1. Your Shopify SEO experience — which stores, what keywords you ranked, and what results you achieved (screenshots or links are a plus)

2. Which SEO tools you have experience with (SEOWILL, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, Semrush, etc.)

3. Have you done product listing on Shopify before? What was your daily volume?

4. Your availability — hours per day, days per week, timezone



To confirm you've read this entire post, start your application with the word **"Organic"** — applications without this word will not be reviewed.
