title: Marketing & Growth Specialist
description:
Marketing & Growth Specialist — UniHop



## About UniHop

UniHop is a technology-enabled last-mile delivery company that helps businesses offer reliable local delivery through software, active dispatch, and operational support. We serve restaurants, caterers, florists, food businesses, and other local service providers who need delivery done right.



We're growing through SEO, content,
, and brand-building — and we're looking for a Marketing & Growth Specialist who can own these efforts end-to-end. This isn't a support role. You'll be responsible for real outcomes, and the primary measure of success is qualified leads generated.



## This Role Is For You If...

You think in systems. You reach for AI tools before doing anything manually. You know how to build a content strategy, execute it consistently, and track whether it's working. You'll be working closely with the CEO and using AI tools extensively — not just for writing, but for research, workflows, automations, and decision-making. We expect AI to be a core part of how you work, not an occasional shortcut.



## What You'll Own



### SEO and Content 

Create and execute a content strategy using AI tools and keyword research. Write, edit, and publish SEO-optimized content on our website. Optimize existing pages for headings, internal links, and meta content. Track rankings and traffic, and adjust strategy based on results.



### Website Content (Next.js / Payload CMS) 

Create and update pages using our content management system (no coding required day-to-day). Improve page structure and calls to action for lead conversion. Coordinate with a developer when layout changes are needed.



###
 Newsletter and Lead Nurturing 

Write and send a weekly
 newsletter to prospects, customers, and subscribers. Develop content that builds trust: customer stories, product updates, educational content, and testimonials. Grow the subscriber list and improve open rates, click-through rates, and conversions. Set up automations and sequences for new leads and follow-ups. We use Brevo (or similar) for
.



### Social Media 

Create and post content across LinkedIn, Instagram,
, and other relevant channels. Develop a consistent posting cadence and content calendar. Repurpose blog content, customer stories, and case studies into social formats. Help evaluate and select the right social scheduling tool for our needs.



### Lead Generation 

This is the core of the role. Build and manage lead magnets — guides, checklists, templates — targeted at our core customer types. Develop and optimize landing pages and CTAs. Set up forms, tagging, and follow-up sequences. Own the qualified lead number.



### Reporting 

Maintain weekly and monthly marketing KPIs. Primary metric is qualified leads. Secondary metrics include traffic,
 performance, social reach, and conversions. Bring insights and recommendations, not just data.



## Tools You'll Use

AI tools daily: Claude, ChatGPT, and others for writing, strategy, research, and automation. Google Analytics and Search Console. Brevo or similar for
 marketing. Social scheduling tool (you'll help us pick the right one). Google Docs and Sheets. Payload CMS for website content management.



## What We're Looking For

Strong, confident written English. 2 to 5 or more years in digital marketing, content, SEO, or a growth role. Genuinely AI-native — you use AI to do the work of a small team, not just to write faster. Organized, proactive, and results-oriented — you report on outcomes, not just activity. Comfortable building systems and playbooks, not just following them.



## Nice to Have

Experience marketing in food, restaurants, catering, delivery, or local services. Experience with Make (Integromat) or other automation tools. Familiarity with headless CMS or modern website stacks. Experience with conversion optimization or split testing.



## Role Details

Remote, flexible hours. Full-time or part-time depending on fit. $8 to $15 per hour depending on experience and AI proficiency. Long-term opportunity with real growth potential as the company scales.



##How to Apply

1. Complete the application form here: 





2. After submitting, send a message through OnlineJobs with the following:



Subject: UniHop Marketing Application Submitted

Message: Hi Brandon — I've completed the UniHop Marketing application form. Looking forward to next steps.



=====

Applications that do not complete both steps may not be reviewed.



Note: This application includes a short required video (2–3 minutes). We use this to understand communication style, presence, and fit. Please only apply if you are comfortable recording a brief, informal video.

  - Understanding how leads are captured, nurtured, and converted



Ideal Candidate

You:

  - think in systems and structure

  - move quickly without needing constant direction

Application Instructions

To apply, include:

2. Portfolio link (required)

3. Answer the following questions (3–5 sentences each):

Requirements

  - Rate: Starting at $5 USD/hour

  - Hours: 20–40 hours per week

  - Must be available to start immediately

title: BI Data Engineer
description:

BI Data Engineer

Capacity: We are looking for a tea
mber

About the Company

We are a global retail business with multiple in-house brands, operating across Australia, New Zealand, the US, and Europe. With a growing e-commerce presence and expanding data capabilities, we are investing in building a robust, scalable data environment to support smarter decision-making across the business.



About the Role

We’re looking for a BI Data Engineer to own the end-to-end data journey; from raw data ingestion through to delivering clear, actionable insights.



This is a hybrid role combining data engineering and business intelligence, where you’ll play a critical part in building reliable data pipelines and translating complex data into meaningful commercial insights.



You’ll work closely with stakeholders across retail, e-commerce, and finance to ensure data is accurate, accessible, and driving real business impact.



Key Responsibilities

- Data Engineering & Architecture

- Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines

- Manage and optimise data infrastructure (Azure environment preferred)

- Develop and maintain data models to support reporting needs

- Monitor data pipelines, troubleshoot issues, and ensure reliability

- Improve performance, data quality, and system efficiency

- Reporting & Business Intelligence

- Develop and maintain Power BI reports and data models

- Translate complex datasets into clear, actionable insights

- Partner with stakeholders to define reporting requirements

- Ensure accuracy of key metrics across sales, inventory, and financial reporting

- Support ongoing enhancements to reporting and analytics capabilities



About You

You’re a technically strong data professional who also understands the commercial impact of data.



You will bring:

- Strong SQL expertise (complex queries, data transformation)

- Experience with cloud data platforms (Azure Synapse)

- Solid understanding of data warehousing and ETL/ELT processes

- Experience building or maintaining data pipelines and models

- Experience with Power BI

- Ability to communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders

- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail



Highly regarded:

- Experience with Databricks

- Experience working with retail or e-commerce data

- Familiarity with platforms such as Shopify, Cin7, or similar systems



Why Join Us

- Opportunity to own and shape the data function

- Work across a global, multi-brand retail business

- High visibility role with direct impact on commercial decisions

- Collaborative and fast-paced environment

description:

Collaborate with sales, operations, and training teams to identify technology gaps and translate business needs into LMS training materials or system solutions.

Assist with the testing and rollout of system updates and new software across store locations.

Support integrations and data flow between POS, ERP, and other sales platforms, flagging discrepancies and working with vendors or IT leadership to resolve them.

Help onboard new users to sales and operations systems, providing hands-on training and documentation.

Assist with reporting and data pulls from ERP and POS systems to support sales operations and management decision-making.

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple open tickets and projects simultaneously

Solid communication skills with the ability to translate technical concepts for non-technical users

Detail-oriented with a proactive approach to identifying and resolving issues.



* Availability of Saturday–Monday is required. Please plan for approximately 4–6 hours per day (starting at 4 hours, with the possibility of increasing to 6). A Windows PC is required.



How to Apply:

3. Complete our brief candidate assessment (approx. 7 minutes):

title: Reviews Specialist (Calling US Homeowners)
description:
Job Title: Reviews Specialist (Calling US Homeowners)



Type: Full time, Remote, Independent Contractor



Hours: Monday–Friday, 12:00 p.m.–9:00 p.m. US Eastern



Compensation: USD $2,000–$3,000/month on target earnings based on experience and performance



****************************



ABOUT THE ROLE: 



Contractor Independence helps roofing companies in the US get more Google reviews from their happy customers.



We’re hiring a Reviews Specialist to call homeowners that have worked with our Clients, ask a few questions about their experience, and guide them to leave a Google review. No cold calling. No selling. Just quality conversations and disciplined follow up.



Your mission: turn completed home visits into consistent, high quality Google reviews.



****************************



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Contact Homeowners: Contact customers after completed appointments via call, SMS, voi
 to gather feedback on their experience with the client’s business.



 Generate Reviews: Gather feedback on customer experience, ask customers to leave a Google review, send the link and guide the customer through leaving a review.



 Resolve Issues: Identify any negative experiences or concerns and escalate them to the team and the client, and put the homeowner at ease.



 Update CRM: Log call outcomes, data, notes, and review status accurately to ensure up to date and accurate records.



*This is a high volume, structured role. You’ll be following a proven script and process, not making it up as you go.



****************************



MUST-HAVE REQUIREMENTS:



     Very clear, easy to understand spoken English for US homeowners (you’ll be on the phone all day - do not apply if you lack this requirement)



     Comfortable handling live calls in English, reading a script, and responding naturally in real time (no stuttering, nervousness, etc. You must be naturally comfortable talking to others)



     2+ years experience in sales, retention, or customer service (call center / BPO / SDR / CSR is ideal)



     Strong communication and customer service skills



     Able to handle high call volume and repetitive outreach without burning out



     Reliable internet, headset, and a quiet work environment



     Able to work Monday–Friday, 12 p.m.–9 p.m. US Eastern, consistently



****************************



NICE-TO-HAVE EXPERIENCE:



     Experience with roofing or home services companies



     Experience using GoHighLevel, or other CRMs



****************************



WHO SUCCEEDS IN THIS ROLE:



     You’re comfortable doing the same core actions every day: dialing, logging, following the script, and following up



     You have thick skin and can stay calm with the occasional upset customer



     You like clear targets and numbers and take pride in hitting them



     You’re coachable: you can take direct feedback on your calls and actually improve



****************************



TOOLS YOU'LL USE



     GoHighLevel (CRM)



     Kixie (dialer/SMS)



     Google Docs / Drive



     Slack



     Zoom



     Loom



****************************



HOW TO APPLY



     Send your CV/resumé



     Record a 3–5 minute video in English (camera on) and send it together with your CV to:          

     



In your video, tell us:



     About yourself



     Your prior experience on the phone (sales/CSR/BPO/etc.)



     Why you think you will excel in this Reviews Specialist role



     Your goals for the next 1–3 years



(!) Record the video as if you were speaking to a US homeowner on the phone.



(!) Start your video with the phrase: “Nothing But Greatness” so we know you read this description.



(!!!) Only candidates who follow these steps and can be clearly understood in English will be considered.



For full details about the role, responsibilities, and our values, read the complete job description here:

You’ll play a pivotal part in ensuring safe, efficient, and compliant transportation operations across our company.



*Key Responsibilities for ELD Support and Compliance

- Provide first-line technical support and troubleshooting for ELD hardware, software, and connectivity issues.

- Train drivers, dispatchers, and tea
mbers on proper ELD usage, Hours of Service (HOS), and best practices for electronic log maintenance.

- Monitor ELD data for compliance, identify exceptions, and generate necessary reports for safety audits and FMCSA mandates.

- Communicate with drivers and fleet managers to resolve ELD-related questions promptly and professionally.

- Document and escalate recurring issues to ELD vendors or internal IT for resolution.

- Maintain up-to-date knowledge of federal and state ELD regulations, ensuring company practices are current and fully compliant.



*Required Qualifications for an ELD Specialist

- 1+ year of hands-on experience with ELD systems or related technology in the trucking, logistics, or transportation industry.

- Solid understanding of FMCSA ELD regulations and Hours of Service rules.

- Strong troubleshooting skills and ability to guide end users through ELD problem-solving steps.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Organized and detail-oriented, with a customer-focused approach to support.

- Ability to manage multiple requests and prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.



*Preferred Skills and ELD Technology Experience

- Familiarity with major ELD vendors and telematics platforms 

- Experience preparing compliance and i
 reports related to ELD usage.

- Bi- or multilingual communication abilities are highly valued.

- Previous training experience with adult learners preferred.

- Comfortable working in hybrid, remote, or on-site transportation environments.



*Performance Expectations and Desired Attributes

- Deliver prompt, friendly, and knowledgeable ELD support to drivers and staff.

- Contribute to continuous process improvements for ELD compliance and reporting.

- Demonstrate adaptability and resourcefulness when addressing new technology or regulatory changes.

- Champion safety, reliability, and compliance across the organization.



*Why Join Our ELD Compliance Team?

- Be a central part of a company committed to safety, innovation, and operational excellence.

- Competitive salary, PTO, and career advancement opportunities in the trucking industry.

- Supportive, team-oriented environment with ongoing ELD and compliance training.

- Opportunity to make a measurable impact on the efficiency and compliance of our fleet operations.



If you are an ELD technology enthusiast with a passion for making compliance simple and effective for commercial drivers and teams, we welcome your application. Join us and drive smarter transportation solutions together!

title: Accounting Assistant & Bookkeeper
description:
Payment Studio is currently in search of a detail-oriented and highly motivated bookkeeper to join our team. The ideal candidate will be well-organized, reliable, and proficient in handling multiple tasks simultaneously. As an integral part of our team, you will be responsible for managing both Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable processes, utilizing your expertise in QuickBooks Online. The role demands excellent time management skills, basic mathematical problem-solving abilities, and meticulous attention to detail.



Key Responsibilities:

- Maintain accurate records of financial transactions by establishing accounts, posting transactions, and ensuring compliance with legal requirements.

- Develop a systematic approach to account for financial transactions, including establishing a chart of accounts and defining bookkeeping policies and procedures.

- Verify, allocate, and post transactions to subsidiary accounts.

- Reconcile entries and balance subsidiary accounts.

- Transfer subsidiary account summaries to maintain the general ledger.

- Prepare trial balances and reconcile entries to balance the general ledger.

- File historical records and documents.

- Compile, analyze, and summarize account information and trends to prepare financial reports.

- Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local legal requirements by studying, enforcing adherence, filing reports, and advising management on necessary actions.

- Contribute to the team effort by accomplishing related results as needed.



Qualifications:

- Bachelor's Degree in Accounting or equivalent field preferred.

- Strong knowledge of accounting and bookkeeping principles.

- Proficient in using Google Sheets and Excel.

- Excellent understanding of QuickBooks Online.

- Power BI experience preferred. 

- AI Tools experience prederred (Claude, ChatGPT...)

- Minimum of 2 years of bookkeeping experience.

- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.

- Motivated individual with a positive and flexible attitude.

- Capable of working collaboratively with others as well as independently.

- Strong organizational and problem-solving skills.





PLEASE NOTE: 

1. This position will require the use of Hubstaff as a time tracker tool.

2. Availability M-F, 9AM-6PM CST required

3. Payments submitted through Wise ONLY (a verified Wise account under your name is needed prior to onboarding)



How To Apply:

Kindly submit your resume and a brief description of why you should be considered for the role. 



If your application is selected for further consideration, we will contact you via email to schedule a virtual interview.



Thank you for considering Payment Studio as your next professional endeavor!

title: Video Editor (Real Estate Media)
description:
About Tygo Studio



Tygo Studio is a U.S.–based real estate media company creating cinematic listing videos, drone footage, and short-form content for agents who want to stand out. We’re building a team that values quality, consistency, and a clean, modern editing style.



Who We’re Looking For



We’re hiring a Rockstar Video Editor who understands what makes a great video — strong visuals, intentional pacing, music selection, sound design, and clean color grading.



You’re a great fit if you:



•  Have strong editing fundamentals and an eye for storytelling

•  Prefer clean, modern edits over heavy effects

•  Are reliable, communicative, and eager to grow

•  Understand English and can speak English

•  Are highly proficient in Final Cut Pro (preferred)

•  Are committed to improving your craft over time



Here's a link to a video edit we are looking for. If you can create something like this, you are a good fit.





What You’ll Be Editing



•  Real estate content: listing videos, closings, branding pieces, lifestyle clips

• Short-form content for Instagram Reels & TikTok

• Long-form content for YouTube

•  Motion graphics, captions, and simple text animations



Turnaround Expectations



Some projects require a 24-hour turnaround, and a sense of urgency is essential. This fast, consistent workflow is a core part of our team culture.



This Role Isn’t for You If You:



•  Prefer freelance or per-project work

•  Rely heavily on flashy transitions or effects

•  Struggle with deadlines or need frequent reminders

•  Don’t enjoy working within a consistent brand style

•  Can’t commit to a 24-hour turnaround when needed



Compensation & Structure



•  This is a team position, not a gig

•  Stable, consistent weekly workload

•  Competitive pay based on experience

•  Opportunities to learn and grow as the company expands

• Performance-based raises over time



Why Join Tygo Studio



•  Be part of a growing Arizona brand

•  Clear direction, examples, and feedback

•  Consistent editing work every week

•  A creative environment where your ideas matter

•  Room to grow your skills and responsibilities



How to Apply



Please send:



1. A brief intro about you and your editing experience

2. 2–3 of your best edited videos

3. Your portfolio (real estate or similar styles preferred)

4. Your expected compensation range



Only applicants who follow the above instructions will be considered.

title: Recruiting Coordinator for US Retail Operations
description:
Title: Part-Time Recruiting Coordinator for US Retail Operations (Long-Term)

Type: Part-time, 15-20 hours/week to start

Pay: $7-8/hour USD depending on experience, paid bi-weekly via Wise



About the role

I'm the owner of Bluewater Northstar LLC, operating three uBreakiFix by Asurion franchises in Austin, Texas. Plans to expand to 6-8 locations over the next two years. I need a recruiting coordinator who can run my hiring process end-to-end and free me to focus on growth. You'll be the front line of my hiring system. I'll set the standards, you'll execute them with discipline.



What you'll do

Source candidates through Indeed, LinkedIn, and ZipRecruiter for retail sales associates and technicians

Source District Manager and Store Manager candidates when those searches are active. I'll provide the framework, you execute it.

Send Testlify skills assessments and track completion

Run 15-20 minute first-round phone or video screens using a structured script I'll provide

Run 60-minute chronological intake interviews for senior candidates (District Manager, Store Manager) using a Topgrading-style script I provide. Job-by-job walk-through, capturing accomplishments with directional metrics. You'll send me the transcript and a written summary. I run the second interview.

Schedule second rounds with me or my district manager

Maintain a candidate pipeline using AI tools (ChatGPT or Claude). I don't want a spreadsheet. I want a clean weekly status I can read in 90 seconds. You'll send the pipeline view in your Friday
, formatted like a kanban board: Sourcing / Screened / Testlify Sent / Interview Scheduled / Finalist / Rejected. Each candidate gets one line: name, role, stage, last action, next step.

Send rejection
s with professional, warm language.



What I need from you

- Strong written and spoken English (US business communication)

- Calm, professional phone presence (US candidates will be on the other end)

- Experience screening US candidates is a plus

- HR or recruiting background preferred

- Working fluency with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude). You'll use them daily.

- Able to work overlap with US Central Time business hours (at least 4 hours of overlap, 9 AM to 1 PM CT)

- Detail-oriented. If you miss a Testlify follow-up or schedule a wrong time zone, the system breaks.



What this is not

This is not a generic VA role. I don't need someone to manage my inbox or do data entry. I need someone who can talk to US candidates, ask the right follow-up questions, and tell the difference between a candidate worth my time and one who isn't.



How to Apply

Send a 3-4 minute video introducing yourself to 
 with the subject line: "Video attached as required"

Use Loom or any platform that gives me a working link. If you upload as an attachment, keep the file under 25MB.



In the video, answer:

1) Walk me through the last hiring process you ran end-to-end. What was the role, how did you source, how did you screen?

2) A candidate calls, sounds polished, says all the right things, but their resume has three jobs in two years. What questions do you ask?

3) How do you use AI tools in your daily work? Show me one specific workflow you've improved with ChatGPT or Claude.



Applications without a video, sent to a different address, or with a different subject line will not be reviewed.



Compensation and growth

Starting at $7-8/hour USD, paid bi-weekly. After 60 days, if it's working, hours expand from 15-20 to 20-25 per week. The role grows into HR generalist work (onboarding, policy, documentation) as we add more stores. Pay reviews happen at 6 and 12 months based on performance and scope.



About me

I'm a remote owner based in Miami, originally from Brazil. Before Bluewater Northstar, I spent 20+ years in global marketing leading brands like Sanofi, Anheuser-Busch, Colgate, and Reckitt. I run my US business from Miami, which means systems and trust matter more than proximity. Direct, fast, fair. I respect people who do their job well and I'm clear when something's off. I'm not a micromanager, but I check the work.

title: Specialist, AI Guest Experience
description:
About INTO

INTO builds AI systems that handle real guest conversations for hospitality teams. Our software answers calls and messages, resolves routine issues, and knows when to bring a human into the conversation.



We work with property managers across North America and Europe who want reliable, 24/7 guest communication without growing large support teams. AI handles the bulk of interactions. Humans step in when judgment, empathy, or policy decisions are required.



Our focus is simple: protect guest trust, reduce unnecessary escalations, and make the system better every day through real operational learning.



About This Role

As a Guest Experience AI Specialist, you work directly with guests and our AI system to resolve issues, answer questions, and ensure a smooth guest experience across voice and messaging channels. **Think Guest Support Agent, Work From Home.**



Most guest conversations are handled by AI. Your role is to step in when situations require human judgment, context, or care — and to help make the system better over time by identifying where and why the AI falls short.



This is not a traditional support role. You are part of a human-in-the-loop operation where your decisions, feedback, and judgment directly shape how the AI performs in the future.



Shift: Day shift, 6:00am to 2:00pm Philippine Standard Time



What you will do

1. Handle guest escalations

- Take over guest conversations when the AI escalates due to uncertainty, sentiment, or policy limits

- Handle warm-transferred calls and complex text-based interactions

- Resolve issues calmly and clearly, balancing guest satisfaction with client policies

- Apply documented policies to make decisions, including refunds when appropriate



2. Protect guest experience quality

- Ensure guest interactions remain clear, respectful, and consistent

- Maintain context during AI ? human handoffs so guests never feel “dropped”

- Use judgment in ambiguous situations rather than relying on rigid scripts



3. Support AI learning and improvement

- Identify cases where the AI failed, misunderstood, or gave incomplete answers

- Tag, document, and explain issues clearly so they can be fixed

- Look for patterns across conversations, not just one-off problems

- Ensure your work contributes to fewer escalations over time



The goal is not to handle more conversations. The goal is to help the system work better.



4. Work within operational workflows

- Use the INTO platform and Guesty to manage conversations and documentation

- Follow escalation guidelines and handoff protocols

- Coordinate with your Team Lead and teammates via Slack

- Flag urgent or high-risk situations quickly and clearly



What you bring

- Experience in guest-facing, hospitality, or customer operations roles

- Strong written and verbal communication skills (English required)

- Calm judgment under pressure and in ambiguous situations

- Comfort working alongside AI systems and learning how they behave

- Willingness to follow policies while knowing when judgment is required



Nice to have

- Experience with messaging or voice-based support tools

- Familiarity with hospitality, short-term rentals, or property management



Compensation

- Range: USD $550 to $650 a month

- Additional compensation for weekend and holiday coverage



More information at: 

Application at:

title: Accounts Executive
description:

Job Overview:

The ideal candidate will be responsible for bookkeeping, back-office coordination, invoicing, client onboarding, and ensuring customer satisfaction and retention.

Bookkeeping & Financial Management

Ensure timely and accurate invoice generation and payment follow-ups.

Back Office & Administrative Support

Coordinate with different departments (sales, operations, HR) to ensure smooth internal processes.

Maintain organized filing systems and client databases.

Invoicing & Billing



Prepare and issue invoices to clients in a timely manner.

Track payments, manage outstanding invoices, and send payment reminders.

Coordinate with the finance team to reconcile billing and payment discrepancies.

Client Onboarding & Relationship Management

Sales Communication & Retention

Reporting & Coordination

Qualifications & Skills:

Customer service mindset and problem-solving attitude.

Experience in client onboarding and CRM systems.

Knowledge of sales support and retention strategies.

Familiarity with financial reporting tools and automation platforms.

title: Medical Records Retrieval Specialist
description:
Codes Health is a well-funded, fast-growing US startup building the modern platform for medical records retrieval. We work with law firms and specialty healthcare providers to get records faster, with zero errors.



Before You Apply

Please read this posting in full before submitting. As the first step in our process, we ask all applicants to send a short video recording (2–3 minutes max) answering the following three prompts:



1. Tell us about yourself — what kind of work you've done before, and why you're interested in this role.

2. Tell us about a mistake you made at work. What happened and what did you do about it?

3. Tell us about a time you improved a process at work. What did you change, and what was the result?



Applications without a video will not be reviewed.



What You'll Do

- Manage end-to-end record retrieval for assigned customers and providers

- Build and improve playbooks for hospitals, billing groups, and provider networks

- Ensure clean, complete, compliant document sets — ROIs, affidavits, billing records — with zero rework

- Surface workflow improvements and flag opportunities to automate repetitive steps

- Share learnings with teammates to raise the team's quality bar



What Success Looks Like

- Records are received faster over time across your assigned providers

- Your playbooks are documented and reused by teammates

- Zero rework — complete, compliant document sets delivered the first time

- You're flagging process improvements, not just completing tasks



What We're Looking For

- Strong English proficiency — written and spoken (required)

- Strong attention to detail — you catch errors before they become problems

- Excellent communication skills — comfortable calling US-based provider offices and following up persistently through phone and

- Organized and reliable — able to manage multiple open requests without dropping anything

- Quick to learn new tools and software workflows

- Ownership mindset — you follow through until the job is done

- Prior experience in medical or legal records, healthcare admin, or similar ops is a plus but not required



Why Codes Health

- YC-backed, well-funded, generating revenue and growing fast

- Remote, full-time role

- High-impact position with real visibility into a growing US company

description:

We're a fast-growing US-based lead generation company that connects concrete contractors with pre-qualified homeowners ready to hire. We're looking for a sharp, motivated appointment setter to join our team and book sales calls with concrete contractor business owners across the United States.

This is a remote, part-time or full-time role with the opportunity to grow as our company expands to 50+ cities.

What You'll Do

 • Make
outbound cold calls per day to concrete contractor business owners in the US

 • Follow a proven script to introduce our lead generation service and handle objections

 • Book qualified Zoo
etings directly onto the sales calendar

 • Follow up with warm leads via phone and

 • Communicate results and call outcomes daily

What We're Looking For

 • Prior B2B cold calling experience is REQUIRED — 

 • Experience selling to small business owners or tradespeople is a strong plus

 • Excellent spoken English; clear, confident, and professional on the phone

 • Comfortable with rejection and able to stay positive through high-volume dialing

 • Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision

 • Reliable internet connection and quiet calling environment

 • Available to work US business hours (any timezone that overlaps EST or CST preferred)

Compensation

 • Base pay: $700-$1,000/month depending on experience

 • Bonus: $10–$25 per qualified Zoo
eting that is held (not just booked)

 • Performance reviews at 30 and 90 days with raise potential

title: VSL Video Editor/AI Generation
description:
VSL Video Editor / AI Generation — Fascial Labs

Full-time · Remote · $1,000/mo base + performance bonuses



About us

Fascial Labs is a fast-growing supplement brand changing how people think about chronic pain. Our flagship product, TrueForm®, is the first supplement built to support fascial health — and we're scaling fast through paid social. We need a video editor who can keep up.

This is a real role with real growth. As we scale, you scale with us.

What you'll do

You'll be the person who turns scripts into finished ads. Every day, you'll be:



Generating AI video footage using tools like Veo, Seedance, Nano Banana, Runway, and similar (we'll teach you what you don't already know — but you need to be hungry to learn fast)

Editing VSLs and short-form ads — talking-head UGC-style content, b-roll-driven ads, advertorial-style explainers

Cutting Meta-ready ad creatives in 9:16, 4:5, and 1:1 — punchy hooks, tight pacing, no wasted seconds

Iterating fast — we test a lot of variations. You'll be cranking out 5–15 ad variants per week, not polishing one masterpiece for a month

Owning the full pipeline from script handoff to final export, including subtitles, music, sound effects, and on-screen text



What we're looking for



2+ years editing experience in Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve (CapCut Pro fluency is a big plus — most of our short-form lives there)

Hands-on experience with AI video tools. If you've used Veo, Seedance, Runway, Pika, Kling, or Nano Banana, tell us what you've made with them

A strong eye for pacing and hooks. You understand why the first 3 seconds matter and you can spot a weak cut before it ships

Speed. This role is about volume and iteration, not perfection. Slow editors don't survive here

Reliable communication. You respond on Slack within a few hours during your work hours. You don't disappear

Excellent written English — enough to follow detailed creative briefs and give feedback on scripts



Bonus points



You've edited DTC supplement, health, or beauty ads before

You've worked with VSL or advertorial-style long-form content

You can match a brand's existing visual style without being told twice

You have your own opinions about what makes an ad work



Compensation



$1,000/month base salary, paid via Wise, Deel, or your preferred method

Performance bonuses tied to ad performance — when our ads win, you win. Top performers can add $500–$1,500/mo in bonuses

Paid time off after 90 days

All AI tool subscriptions covered — Veo, Seedance, Runway, Midjourney, etc.



What we're not

We're not a corporate job. There's no 47-step approval process. If you do good work, you'll see it running on Meta within days. If you have ideas, we want them. If you want to grow into a creative lead role as we scale, that path is open.

How to apply

Send us:



- Your portfolio or reel — link us to 3–5 of your best ad cuts (UGC, VSL, or short-form). If you've made anything with AI video tools, include it

- A short Loom (under 3 minutes) introducing yourself, walking us through one piece of work you're proud of, and telling us why this role





Applications without a Loom won't be reviewed. We're looking for people who care enough to do the extra step.

We review applications within 24 hours and reply to everyone, yes or no.

title: AIRBNB Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Title: Airbnb Virtual Assistant (Full Management Division – Arbitrage Empire)

Who Is This Role For?



We are looking for a highly experienced, detail-oriented Airbnb Virtual Assistant who understands short-term rental operations at a high level.



This is NOT an entry-level role.



This role is for someone who has real Airbnb experience managing listings, handling guests, coordinating cleaners, dealing with Airbnb support, and protecting host accounts.



If you do not have Airbnb or short-term rental experience, please do not apply.



About Us – Arbitrage Empire



Arbitrage Empire is a fast-growing Airbnb education and full-service management company.



We help clients:



Launch profitable short-term rental properties



Scale their portfolios



Operate units professionally through our full management division



Our management company oversees multiple short-term rental accounts across the U.S., serving business professionals, travel nurses, and mid-term guests.



We pride ourselves on:



High occupancy



Strong guest communication



5-star reviews



Operational excellence



As we continue to scale, we are hiring a strong Airbnb VA to join our full management team and help maintain elite standards across our client portfolio.



What This Role Includes



You will be managing and supporting our full management clients’ Airbnb accounts.



Your responsibilities include:



Guest messaging (pre-booking, during stay, post-checkout)



Coordinating cleaners to ensure on-time turnovers



Scheduling and managing maintenance requests



Communicating with building staff or vendors



Handling Airbnb support tickets and case escalations



Managing claims and negotiating resolutions



Monitoring listings for pricing, availability, and optimization



Managing reviews and submitting removal requests when necessary



Monitoring Ring cameras and property tech



Tracking operational updates in 
 or our CRM



Reporting daily KPIs and issues to leadership



You will be directly responsible for protecting client accounts and ensuring 5-star service across the board.



Qualifications Required



Previous experience managing Airbnb listings (required)



Deep understanding of Airbnb platform policies and case management



Experience communicating with Airbnb support



Strong written English (very important)



Highly organized and detail-oriented



Able to work independently without constant supervision



Strong problem-solving skills



Comfortable working in a fast-paced, scaling company



Coachable and growth-oriented mindset



Bonus if you:



Have experience as an Airbnb case manager



Have managed 20+ listings at once



Understand mid-term rental strategy



Schedule



48–56 hours per week



Must be available during 3 PM – 11 PM Mountain Standard Time



Weekend availability required



Compensation



$800 USD per month

Long-term opportunity with room for growth and bonuses based on performance.



We are looking for someone who wants stability, growth, and to grow with a scaling company.



How to Apply



If you're interested in this role, follow these exact steps (applications that do not follow instructions will be ignored):



Apply through link: 
/to/L9tYnNMP

description:

Not just anyone.



Someone who understands credit repair

and can also operate as a high-level executive assistant.



If that’s you… keep reading.



---



ABOUT US

We’re a Texas-based credit company with a proven track record, strong systems, and a team that actually cares about doing things the right way.

and we’re growing.

---

mbers

title: Calling All Go High Level Specialists!!
description:
WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING WITH US…



Ascend Innovation is a fast-moving, systems-driven company focused on helping businesses improve customer engagement through automation, AI tools, and streamlined processes.



We build structured systems that eliminate missed opportunities and help our clients operate more efficiently.



You’ll be joining a startup environment where systems matter, details matter, and your work directly contributes to real outcomes for clients.



We provide clear SOPs, structured onboarding, and ongoing support to help you succeed in your role.



We believe in long-term tea
mbers and actively look for ways to help you grow, take on more responsibility, and develop your skills over time.



You won’t just be completing tasks, you’ll be playing a key role in helping new clients join our company and building the systems that power our process.



THE ROLE WE ARE HIRING FOR



We are hiring a Go High Level Client On-boarding Specialist



This role is focused on onboarding new clients into our systems using GoHighLevel and following detailed SOPs to ensure every client account is set up correctly and efficiently.



Your daily and weekly tasks will include:



Creating and setting up client sub-accounts in GoHighLevel



Following step-by-step SOPs for client onboarding and system setup



Ensuring all client information is entered accurately and completely



Troubleshooting setup issues and identifying errors



Updating and improving SOPs as systems evolve



Managing and tracking onboarding tasks in Asana



Working with data and tracking progress in Google Sheets



Communicating clearly with the team regarding progress, blockers, and updates



This role requires someone who is highly detail-oriented, organized, and able to follow structured processes while also thinking critically when something doesn’t work as expected.



THE IMPORTANCE OF THIS ROLE



This is a critical systems role within our company.

You will directly impact:

The success of new client onboarding

The accuracy and reliability of our systems

The efficiency of our internal operations

The overall client experience

The right candidate will help ensure every client is onboarded smoothly while also improving the systems we use as we grow.



WHY WE’RE A GREAT PLACE TO WORK



We are building modern systems that combine automation, AI, and strong operational processes.

We move quickly, but we rely on structure and clear systems to stay organized and efficient.



We value tea
mbers who take ownership of their work, pay attention to detail, and care about doing things the right way.



You’ll be supported with clear documentation, defined processes, and a team that communicates openly and works collaboratively.



THE VALUES WE STAND BY



Systems create consistency

Details matter

We take ownership of our work

We improve and optimize continuously

We support each other as a team

We focus on real outcomes, not just activity



PAY AND HOURS



Starting rate:

300–400 PHP per hour (based on experience)



This position is available:

Immediately



This is a:

Long-term position



Provisional Schedule:

Monday – Friday

08:00 to 17:00 EDT (Florida, USA)



You will be available for:

30–40 hours per week



We offer:

Weekly pay

Performance-based bonuses

Opportunities for increased responsibility and compensation over time



NOW THE IMPORTANT PART – HOW YOU CAN APPLY:



If this role sounds like a great fit for you, we’d love to hear from you.



Please complete this short application form to get started:







We review applications based on form responses only.



You do not need to send a CV or resume at this stage.

We will contact shortlisted candidates after reviewing submissions.



Looking forward to reviewing your form application



Orion - Ascend Innovation

title: Executive Administrative Assistant (GoHighLevel Expert)
description:
Kaizen Education Services is a 14-year-old Calgary-based cognitive and executive function assessment + coaching company. We are currently looking for administrative support for co-owners Jameson Welbourn and Samantha Woods, as well as our existing admin contractor, Ashley.



This role is ideal for a highly experienced Executive Administrative Assistant with strong operational skills and deep expertise in GoHighLevel.



ROLE OVERVIEW



This is a part-time role (4 hours per day / 20 hours per week), with the potential to transition into a full-time position over time. We are targeting a start date around mid-May to the third week of May.



The successful candidate must be available to work during evening/graveyard hours aligned with Arizona (MST) time zone.



We are looking for a proactive, detail-oriented Executive Assistant who can support day-to-day administrative operations, manage systems, and help streamline workflows. This role requires someone who can anticipate needs, identify problems before they arise, and provide solutions independently.



------

ROLE AT A HIGH LEVEL



** Inbox ownership: Manage the company 
 along with delegated access to both co-owners’ inboxes (triage, drafting replies, follow-ups)

** Documentation and organization: Maintain and organize internal SOPs in Notion and archive files in Google Drive

** GoHighLevel (GHL): Monitor and perform light edits (with increased responsibility once the GHL build-out is completed around month 3)

** Podcast outreach (end-to-end): Conduct show research, draft personalized pitches from co-owners’ inboxes, join weekly personalization calls, manage follow-ups, and handle scheduling once confirmed

** Monthly Masterclass operations: Prepare Canva presentations (based on existing templates) and manage attendee follow-up
s with resources

**
 campaigns and execution: Support and manage
 campaigns and sequences created by the co-owners

** Canva support: Refine and enhance marketing materials, presentations, and resources



REQUIREMENTS



** 4–5+ years experience as an Executive Assistant or in a similar role

** Strong expertise in GoHighLevel (GHL), including navigation, workflows, and integrations

** Experience with inbox and calendar management at an executive level

** Familiarity with AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT) for productivity and communication

** Proficiency in Notion (creating, structuring, and maintaining SOPs and internal documentation)

** Strong research skills (e.g., podcast outreach, data gathering, verification)

** Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

** Highly proactive, organized, and detail-oriented

** Ability to work independently with minimal supervision



WORK SETUP



** Part-time: 4 hours per day (20 hours per week)

** Schedule: Evening / Graveyard shift (Arizona – MST time zone)

** Start date: Mid-May to third week of May

** Potential to transition into a full-time role



HOW TO APPLY



To submit your application, please send the following:



** Updated CV

** 2-minute video introduction

** Work portfolio or relevant samples (especially related to GoHighLevel)

** Use the subject line: "GENIUS" - Executive Assistant {Your Name}



Please send your application to: 

------

Qualified applicants will be asked to complete a short skills assessment as part of the process. This will consist of simple questions, mostly focused on rating your current level of proficiency so we can better understand your strengths and areas for training.

title: Appointment Setter Needed for Inbound & Outbound Calls (Remote) - As Soon As Possible
description:
We’re looking for an enthusiastic Appointment Setter who’s high-energy and ready to call inbound leads as well as outbound leads to book appointments for our agency.



You’ll be handling inbound and outbound inquiries, building rapport with potential clients, and scheduling qualified appointments for our consultants. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys speaking to people.



Key Responsibilities

- Handle inbound calls from potential clients and answer initial inquiries

- Make outbound calls to qualified leads

- Build rapport, listen actively, and identify client needs

- Schedule appointments and input information into our CRM

- Follow up with leads to maximize the conversion rate from inquiry to appointment

- Maintain an organized call log and provide daily reports



Compensation

- Potential monthly earnings: $500-$900



Requirements

- Proven experience in appointment setting, sales, or customer service

- Strong verbal and written communication skills

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively

- Experience with GoHighLevel is a must

- Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and reliable

- Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace



To Apply

Please DM a voice recording introducing yourself and explaining why you’re interested in this role. This recording is mandatory and helps us assess your communication skills and phone presence.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: High-Ticket Sales Closer – E-commerce Marketing Agency
description:
We’re hiring a killer sales closer to take qualified inbound appointments and close high-ticket deals for our fast-growing e-commerce marketing agency.



This is NOT a prospecting role, you will be speaking to pre-qualified store owners who booked in because they want help scaling.



If you can handle real conversations, create urgency, and close without being pushy, keep reading.



About Us



We help e-commerce brands scale through:



• Google Ads

• Meta Ads

• Conversion optimization

• CRM & lead nurturing systems

• Marketplace & B2B expansion strategies



We generate consistently 40 qualified appointments per week.



Now we need someone who can convert them at 15 to 25 percent consistently.



Your Role



• Take 45 to 60 minute discovery / strategy calls

• Diagnose the store’s bottlenecks

• Present our offer clearly and confidently

• Handle objections naturally

• Close on the call

• Follow up with warm leads who didn’t close immediately



You will be closing high-ticket monthly retainers.



No prospecting required.



What We Expect



• Native or near-native English

• Proven experience closing high-ticket offers

• Comfortable closing $2K to $5K+ monthly retainers

• Understand e-commerce and marketing basics

• Confident but not arrogant

• Strong follow-up discipline



You must be hungry.



We are not looking for “order takers”.

We want someone who sees objections as opportunities.



Compensation: $2000-$5000/month



If you close 4 to 6 deals per month, this becomes very lucrative.



To Apply, Send:



- A short Loom introducing yourself

- Your past closing results (numbers matter)

- Average close rate

- Average deal size

- Why you think you’re a killer closer



We move fast. If you know you can close, apply now.

description:
We’re looking for an enthusiastic Appointment Setter who’s high-energy and ready to call HOT inbound leads as well as outbound leads to book appointments for our agency.



You’ll be handling inbound and outbound inquiries, building rapport with potential clients, and scheduling qualified appointments for our consultants. This role is performance-based and ideal for someone who enjoys speaking to people and getting rewarded for results.



Key Responsibilities

- Handle inbound calls from potential clients and answer initial inquiries

- Make outbound calls to qualified leads

- Build rapport, listen actively, and identify client needs

- Schedule appointments and input information into our CRM

- Follow up with leads to maximize the conversion rate from inquiry to appointment

- Maintain an organized call log and provide daily reports



Compensation

- Pay per appointment booked

- Potential monthly earnings: $500-$900, based on performance and volume



Requirements

- Proven experience in appointment setting, sales, or customer service

- Strong verbal and written communication skills

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively

- Experience with GoHighLevel is a must

- Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and reliable

- Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace



To Apply

Please DM a voice recording introducing yourself and explaining why you’re interested in this role. This recording is mandatory and helps us assess your communication skills and phone presence.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: ANIME/MANGA/GAMING VIDEO EDITOR — TIKTOK CINEMATIC EDITS | $15/video | Long-term
description:
We are looking for passionate video editors to create high-performing cinematic edits on anime, manga, and gaming universes for our TikTok organic strategy.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



You will create short-form cinematic edits inspired by iconic characters and universes from anime, manga, 

and video games.



This is a per-video role: the more you produce, the more you earn. 

There is no cap on volume.



Reference style we are looking for:

???? 



---



WHAT YOU WILL EDIT



4K cinematic edits of One Piece, Demon Slayer, Ghost of Tsushima, Bleach, and more.

Each edit ends with a seamless transition to our real katana product.



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



You must have DEEP knowledge of anime, manga, and gaming culture. 

This is non-negotiable. We want fans, not generic editors.



You must have proven experience creating cinematic edits in styles such as:

— Anime AMV / edits 4K

— Gaming highlight edits

— Phonk / hardstyle edits

— Cinematic slow-motion edits





You must be available on a long-term basis and capable of producing at least 15 videos per month (more is welcome and encouraged).



---



WHAT WE OFFER



— $15 per video

— Paid test from day one

— Long-term collaboration with potential for full-time if you want

— Bonuses for videos that go viral (1M+ views)



---



HOW TO APPLY



- Send us your portfolio or examples of anime/gaming edits you have made.

- Tell us your top 3 favorite anime-manga-videos games

- Tell us what tools you use and how many videos you can produce per month.



?? Applications without a portfolio will be ignored.

title: Ecommerce Operations & Marketing Virtual Assistant (Part-Time, 20 hrs/week)
description:
Overview

MLE, a women's fashion accessories company (
) is looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant to support our ecommerce operations, customer experience, and outreach efforts.



This is a part-time role (~20 hours/week) focused on maintaining smooth day-to-day operations while supporting growth through outreach.



You should be detail-oriented, reliable, and comfortable following SOPs while also helping improve them over time.



Core Responsibilities (Priority-Based):



1. Customer Support & Operations (High Priority)

-Respond to customer service
s via Gorgias

-Process returns, refunds, and exchanges

-Track shipments and resolve delivery issues

-File missing mail claims and follow up with carriers (UPS, etc.)

-Schedule carrier pickups and coordinate logistics



2. Ecommerce Management (Shopify + Faire)

-Create and update Shopify product listings

-Upload and maintain Faire product listings

-Update website content (product pages, descriptions, images)

-Ensure listings are accurate and aligned with inventory

-Flag low inventory or discrepancies



3. Outreach & Growth Support (Secondary Priority)

-Research and contact retail partners, PR contacts, and influencers

-Maintain outreach trackers and follow-up sequences

-Assist with influencer outreach campaigns



4. Light Content Support (As Time Allows)

-Schedule and manage organic Instagram posts using a content calendar



5. Reporting & Tracking

Maintain weekly reports on:

-Customer support volume and issues

-Orders, returns, and delivery problems

-Outreach progress (responses, follow-ups)

-Keep trackers and dashboards organized and up to date



6. SOP Documentation & Process Improvement

-Follow existing SOPs for all tasks

-Document workflows and update SOPs over time

-Suggest improvements to increase efficiency



Requirements

-Strong written English communication skills

-Experience with Shopify (required)

-Experience with customer support tools like Gorgias (preferred)

-Highly detail-oriented and organized

-Comfortable handling repetitive operational tasks

-Able to manage time effectively in a part-time role



Nice to Have

-Experience with Faire marketplace

-Experience with influencer or PR outreach

-Basic Canva or content formatting skills

-Ecommerce logistics experience (shipping, returns, claims)



Working Style

-Part-time (~20 hours/week)

-Customer support and operations tasks are the highest priority

-Outreach and content tasks will be handled as time allows

-Must be responsive and reliable



To Apply

Please include:



1. A brief introduction and relevant experience

2. Examples of Shopify work or product listings you’ve managed

3. Experience with customer support and/or outreach

4. Your availability and timezone



We’re looking for someone long-term with the opportunity to grow into a full-time role as responsibilities expand.

title: Accounting Supervisor
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW:

SimpleKeep is a modern US-based accounting company that values our team and creates a fun, dynamic work environment. Our goal is to provide exceptional accounting services to our clients while fostering a positive and supportive team culture. We are a remote team that leverages the latest technology to work together efficiently and effectively.



We're a great company to work for, and a small team, so you'll be able to come in and really have an impact on the way we do business. We're growing, and we’re looking to add an experienced person to our team.



POSITION OVERVIEW:

We’re seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Accounting Supervisor with proficiency in QuickBooks and Xero to join our growing remote team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in accounting, a passion for mentoring and developing staff, and a desire to work in a dynamic and supportive team environment. This is a remote position with flexible work hours.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Supervision and Leadership:

- Manage and oversee daily accounting operations, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger.

- Mentor and provide guidance to junior accountants and other tea
mbers.

- Conduct performance evaluations and provide feedback to staff.

- Develop and maintain accounting policies and procedures.

2. Financial Reporting:

- Oversee the preparation and analysis of financial statements.

- Ensure timely and accurate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.

- Provide financial analysis and insights to clients.

3. Bookkeeping and Reconciliation

- Ensure accurate and timely recording of financial transactions.

- Oversee bank reconciliations, accounts payable, and accounts receivable processes.

- Ensure accurate and timely month-end and year-end close processes.

- Prepare financial statements and other financial reports.

4. Budgeting and Forecasting:

- Lead the preparation of budgets and financial forecasts.

- Monitor budget performance and report variances.

5. Tax Compliance:

- Supervise the preparation and filing of tax returns.

- Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local tax regulations.

6. Software Utilization:

- Oversee the use of QuickBooks and Xero for all accounting functions.

- Ensure data integrity and accuracy within these systems.

7. Audit and Compliance:

- Ensure compliance with internal financial and accounting policies and procedures.

- Coordinate and support internal and external audits.

8. Communication:

- Communicate effectively with clients, vendors, and financial institutions.

- Provide clear and concise reports and updates to senior management.

- Ensure excellent English communication within the team and with stakeholders.

- Provide exceptional customer service to clients.

- Collaborate with other departments to streamline processes and improve efficiency.



QUALIFICATIONS:

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

- CPA certification preferred.

- Minimum of 5 years of accounting experience, with at least 2 years in a supervisory role.

- Proficiency in QuickBooks and Xero is mandatory.

- Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting.

- Excellent organizational and time-management skills.

- Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks.

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

- Experience in managing remote teams and working with US clients.

- Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other accounting software.

- Efficient, personable, adaptable, and organized.



WORK ENVIRONMENT:

This is a remote position; candidates must have a reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace.



BENEFITS:

- Competitive salary and benefits package.

- Flexible work hours and remote work environment.

- Opportunities for growth and advancement.

- A supportive team culture that values work-life balance and employee satisfaction.

- Health card benefit after 9 months of employment.



WORKING SCHEDULE: Tuesday-Saturday 3am-12nn Manila Time



APPLICATION INSTRUCTION:

After you're done reading through the post, if you're ready to apply for the position, please send an
 to 
 sending your
, please be sure to:

- Attach your resume.

- Include a summary of your experience.

title: General Accountant
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW:

SimpleKeep is a modern US-based accounting company that values our team and creates a fun, dynamic work environment. Our goal is to provide exceptional accounting services to our clients while fostering a positive and supportive team culture. We are a remote team that leverages the latest technology to work together efficiently and effectively.

We're a great company to work for, and a small team, so you'll be able to come in and really have an impact on the way we do business. We're growing, and we’re looking to add an experienced person to our team.



POSITION OVERVIEW:

SimpleKeep is a dynamic and innovative company committed to providing exceptional financial services to our clients. We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented General Accountant with experience in QuickBooks and Xero to join our remote team. This role is perfect for a self-motivated individual who thrives in a fast-paced environment and is looking to contribute to a growing company.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Financial Reporting:

- Prepare, examine, and analyze financial statements, ensuring accuracy and compliance with accounting standards.

- Generate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports for management review.

2. Bookkeeping:

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of all financial transactions.

- Reconcile bank statements, accounts payable, and accounts receivable.

3. Budgeting and Forecasting:

- Assist in the preparation of budgets and financial forecasts.

- Monitor and report on budget variances.

4. Tax Preparation:

- Assist in the preparation and filing of tax returns.

- Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local tax regulations.

5. Accounts Management:

- Manage and process payroll, invoices, and expense reports.

- Handle accounts payable and receivable, ensuring timely payments and collections.

6. Software Utilization:

- Utilize QuickBooks and Xero for all accounting functions.

- Ensure accurate data entry and maintenance within these systems.

7. Compliance and Audit:

- Ensure compliance with internal financial and accounting policies and procedures.

- Assist with internal and external audits as needed.

8. Communication:

- Liaise with clients, vendors, and financial institutions as necessary.

- Provide support to the finance team and other departments as needed.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.

-Minimum of 2 years of experience in accounting or bookkeeping.

-Proficiency in QuickBooks and Xero is mandatory.

- Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting.

-Excellent organizational and time-management skills.

- Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- CPA or relevant certification is a plus.



WORK ENVIRONMENT:

This is a remote position; candidates must have a reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace.



BENEFITS:

- Competitive salary and benefits package.

- Flexible work hours and remote work environment.

- Opportunities for growth and advancement.

- A supportive team culture that values work-life balance and employee satisfaction.

- Health card benefit after 9 months of employment.



WORKING SCHEDULE: Tuesday-Saturday 3am-12nn Manila Time



APPLICATION INSTRUCTION:

After you're done reading through the post, if you're ready to apply for the position, please send an
 to 
 sending your
, please be sure to:

1. Attach your resume.

2. Include a summary of your experience.
